faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What is the closing rank in NEET UG for a seat in BDS at ESIC Dental College, New Delhi?
faqs.answer: ESIC Dental College NEET UG Cutoff 2024 was released for Round 1. The cutoff was released for the General, OBC, SC, ST, PWD and EWS category candidates. To get admission in BDS, the cutoff ranks for the General AI category candidates closed at 29024. For the OBC AI candidates, the cutoff rank to get BDS admission closed at 30361.

faqs.question: I have got 2000 rank in NEET UG. What rank do I require to take admission in ESIC Dental College?

Therefore students with a rank of 2K will have a better chance at admission. However, please remember that other categories will have different qualifying ranks.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely a career building opportunity. Faculty is good and 100% placement is offered.

review_content.Placements: As the college is government-affiliated, there is a bond of 5 years in which they include 4 years of studies and 1 year of paid internship, and after that, there is 1 year of JRship with a 1.2 lacs monthly salary. After that, do what you want. MS, BDS professional, etc. roles can be achieved.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is very good and has lots of scope in the future, like orthodontics, endodontics, periodontics and many more. But the infrastructure of the hostel is too bad, and it can't be said that this is the place for living. No cleanliness, no hygiene in mess food, and no operation from the warden side.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good patient exposure and good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Most of my seniors have got good NEET PG ranks and are working in reputable hospitals. Other than that, students who do not want to pursue MS can get a good JRship or interview for the jobs at ESIC itself. Some students also go for the army after UG or PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is in bad condition, or else the infrastructure is good. Labs and classrooms are average, but there are some problems as microscopes do not work. Air-conditioners work only in some labs and rooms. The library is good and had enough space. It has all the books necessary for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very bad infrastructure and lack of facilities. No cultural events.

review_content.Placements: Placement is pretty good. Package depends on the ability of student. If one is good with the practical work he/she can get a good handsome amount. Top recruiting companies involve clove dental and many more. You can also get a job in indian army as a dentist. If you join as undergraduate, you become a captian in army, if you join as post graduate you become major in army. After fourth year there is an internship of 1 year in which you got a stipend of 23,500 INR. If you are in government college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the labs are well-equipped with instruments and other essentials Infrastructure if hostel is less than average. The roofs are leaking. Sweepers do not do their jobs unless we force them. We have to struggle a lot in order to live in such a pathetic condition. The quality of water is also not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: You can get an average experience, and your personality will get well-shaped.

review_content.Placements: There is nothing like placements in the college. After graduation, u have to do internships, in which they offer Rs. 23,000 per month. Then you will need to crack NEET PG exam o JR exam to get a job, but that is not permanent for 6 months.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not good. There is a common canteen for patients and college students. Air-conditioners won't be working. Campus Wi-Fi will be a dream. In the hostel, you will get your room and they say it's in sharing for boys. But for girls, there are different scenarios.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A place where you can learn, but do not good expect infrastructure and good college life.

review_content.Placements: Medical courses generally do not require placements and so with BDS. However, ESIC provides placements in all its hospitals across India to all the passed out students through the college with a five-year bond term. A one-year paid internship is provided after the course, and it is mandatory for all students. One can get a degree only after internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. There are small 4 lecture theatres. There is no auditorium or student canteen. The area of the college is very small. There is no apparent sports playground. The clinical halls and dental chairs are also not that sufficient, you have to struggle hard in every aspect.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college if you want to pursue dentistry.

review_content.Placements: Most of the seniors I met are serving bonds. This year, a few of our seniors cracked NEET MDs with AIR under 10. Some of them go for further studies like an MBA; others go for the army and other exams . This is a 4-year course where you will be spending a good amount of money on tuition and all other things other than the fees. After that, you get a year of internship inside the college only, which is paid . Then about 14 months of bond service, which is done by the college itself, is also paid at the post of junior resident and is paid well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is poor. But the quality of teachers makes up for it. Teachers are literally handpicked and they will just teach you whether you want to or not and make you a good doctor. Mess food is okay. The college is really very small. You won't even feel like you're in college; it feels a bit school-like. But as you become part of the family, this small college will become your home.

ESIC Dental College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 34650 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

ESIC Dental College BDS cutoff 2025 was 34650 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 47078 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

ESIC Dental College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: Dental Council of India, New Delhi and Government of India

college_info.intro: Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital offers two popular courses, namely BDS and MDS. These are offered in affiliation with the RGUHS in full-time mode. Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) is offered at the UG level for the duration of 5 years. The seat intake for the same is 60. On the other hand, MDS course is provided at the PG level for the duration of 3 years in 9 specialties. KCDSH has entered into MoUs with other general hospitals in Bengaluru to facilitate hospital postings for students. Candidates can take a look below at the Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital offers two medical programmes, namely BDS and MDS. Studying at the college can be considered expensive as the fee ranges from INR 7.5 Lacs to INR 19.8 Lacs. Students must note that in the total fee charged by the college, multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more can be included. Some of these components, such as the security fee, and application fee are one-time chargeable.
faqs.question: Is studying at Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee range for the MDS programme at Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital ranges between INR 7.5 lakh-INR 18.2 lakh. The fee structure is sourced from unofficial sources, hence indicative. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MDS at Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital?

review_content.Placements: We have to do internship in our college We have our own hospital where we have pretty good number of patients coming every day. The college will not give placements. The yearly package I got was 4.5 lakh. Since I'm a non-Karnataka, I've got more packages, but if you are from Karnataka, you might get it for less.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library where we can study and even books are available for all the subjects (medical subjects to dental subjects). The infrastructure of the college is not that great but for 10 departments there is sufficient place for students to sit and the college is pretty big.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college through my lens.

review_content.Placements: In our course, we don't have campus placements available. However, once we graduate and start looking for jobs, it’s relatively easy to find suitable positions. During internships, we work part-time after college hours, which helps us earn at least 5,000 INR per month. A full-time job after a BDS degree can fetch a salary of INR 15,000 to 30,000 per month. After completing a postgraduate degree, if one opts for teaching, the minimum salary can be around INR 20,000 whereas a clinical practice can offer a higher amount.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides free Wi-Fi access in the library. Besides the Wi-Fi, the library offers a wide range of books, articles, journals, newspapers, question papers, magazines, and computer facilities. We can also obtain Xerox and printouts from here. Our classrooms are well-ventilated and equipped with projectors and screens. The clinics are well-equipped with lasers, electrocautery, CBCT, RVG, and surgical microscopes, which facilitate providing advanced treatments. The hostels are situated in a peaceful environment. The quality of food is average, with a few special items served during festivals. We have a full-time physician and a pharmacy available on campus. The hostel facilities include lifts, a gym, and a sports ground.

review_summary.college_name: Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krishnadevaraya College of Dental Sciences and Hospital.

content.Placements: We have to do internship in our college We have our own hospital where we have pretty good number of patients coming every day. The college will not give placements. The yearly package I got was 4.5 lakh. Since I'm a non-Karnataka, I've got more packages, but if you are from Karnataka, you might get it for less.
content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library where we can study and even books are available for all the subjects (medical subjects to dental subjects). The infrastructure of the college is not that great but for 10 departments there is sufficient place for students to sit and the college is pretty big.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college through my lens.

content.Placements: In our course, we don't have campus placements available. However, once we graduate and start looking for jobs, it’s relatively easy to find suitable positions. During internships, we work part-time after college hours, which helps us earn at least 5,000 INR per month. A full-time job after a BDS degree can fetch a salary of INR 15,000 to 30,000 per month. After completing a postgraduate degree, if one opts for teaching, the minimum salary can be around INR 20,000 whereas a clinical practice can offer a higher amount.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides free Wi-Fi access in the library. Besides the Wi-Fi, the library offers a wide range of books, articles, journals, newspapers, question papers, magazines, and computer facilities. We can also obtain Xerox and printouts from here. Our classrooms are well-ventilated and equipped with projectors and screens. The clinics are well-equipped with lasers, electrocautery, CBCT, RVG, and surgical microscopes, which facilitate providing advanced treatments. The hostels are situated in a peaceful environment. The quality of food is average, with a few special items served during festivals. We have a full-time physician and a pharmacy available on campus. The hostel facilities include lifts, a gym, and a sports ground.

Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam JEE Main. But if candidate haven't taken any entrance exam, university recommend taking the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam for admisison. reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

review_content.Placements: They only give provisional placements for 3 months, and if you qualify provisional period, you get a permanent placement, but your package will be, like, 1.2 LPA. First three months, the HRs will treat you nicely, but as soon as your provisional period ends, they will get rude with you, as the responsibility of the university ends after the provisional period. They will react as if they never wanted to hire you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Very nice university give good placements.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in BPT. The highest package was 25 LPA and the lowest package was 10 LPA. Physiomate was a recurring recruiter for the course. Around 99.9% of students got internships through the course, including in international companies, one even got selected as a sports physiotherapist for the Indian cricket team.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

review_summary.college_name: Bahra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides a good experience and good weather.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed every year. The median package is 3-4 LPA. Most percent of students get placed in the internship. Physiotherapist roles are offered in our course, and we get Dr. Prefix and a medical course from a well-reputed college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.

content.Placements: Usually 60% of students get placement directly through the college. Maximum others are also able to land a good job on their own. The average package in B.Tech computer science is 8 LPA - 9 LPA, and the highest package given is 25 LPA. Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and many more are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and the placement system of the college in 2024.

content.Placements: 45% of students in the BBA course are placed, with the highest package offered being 5 LPA and the lowest package at 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro are among those that came for recruitment. Only 2% of students got internships from the university. The roles offered include Executive and Human Resources Management.

Additionally, cameras are also not available. The quality of food provided in the college mess is very poor, the mess is untidy, and the food prepared doesn't taste good.

admission_overview.college_name: Bahra University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Bahra University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bahra University admissionis open for all the courses. The university offers UG, PG, diploma and Doctoral programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Pharmacy and others.Bahra Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about Bahra University admission, course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat, fees and admission process:

Bahra University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech courses. Further, for other courses, admission is based on the last qualifying exam score and Counsellor Interaction. The table below lists courses offered at Bahra University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Check here for more to know more aboutBahra University courses:
Download:Bahra University Prospectus

Bahra University feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bahra University seatintake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Bahra University's admission process includes registration followed by a conversation with the admission counsellor. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BU:
STEP 1: Bahra University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at BU is INR 1,100.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission, followed by counsellor Interaction. The university also has the facility for provisional registration or seat booking by paying an amount of INR 10,000.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aBahra University course feeto confirm their admission.

The quality of food provided in the college mess is very poor, the mess is untidy, and the food prepared doesn't taste good.

reviews.review_heading: Bahra University review for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like well-managed classrooms and labs for students with 4 types of windows like Linux, Microsoft, and others are provided.  Hostel facilities are well-managed. Food is well prepared. Games are playable inside the auditorium. College provides a healthy food cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Bahra.
reviews.review_text: Bahra University offers state-of-the-art infrastructures that render its campuses conducive to students' learning. This campus has modern classrooms equipped with advanced audio-visual aids, digitized libraries housing numerous titles and other resources, and sophisticated laboratories for hands-on learning across various sectors. This university provides its students with high-speed internet connectivity and bullet-proof IT infrastructure to facilitate academic and research endeavors. Further p...

reviews.review_heading: Really good nature and climate the whole year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good; the labs are big and well managed. Also, the classes are good for study and the Wi-Fi is not that good because of the low speed of internet and the library is open 24/7, which is a very good thing; students can study in the library anytime. The hostel food is bad because the taste is not good and the quality is also not very good. Medical facilities are available but not good. No sports or games are there in our university.

reviews.review_heading: In this, I have given a brief review of Bahra University. By reading this, one can easily understand
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is very slow. In computer labs, computers hang too much, and some of them are not working. Keyboards are of low quality. Physics labs and Chemistry labs are good. The library is also good, and almost all required books are present there. Hostel facilities are average. Medical facilities are present. Food in the mess is sometimes good and sometimes bad. There is a ground to play games in front of the hostels. That is the only ground, which is a negative point. Canteens are present, in...

reviews.review_heading: Bahra university review.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library are well-managed in my university. Classrooms are well-managed. Infrastructure is good. The hostel is well-managed by the warden, sir. Food quality is good for their state people. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are not playable there.

reviews.review_heading: All about Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not too good. Wi-Fi of the hostel and university both don't work rightly. Also, the computers from the computer lab don't work, they arrange them for show. Classrooms are too small for 80 students. The library is good but some of the important books are not there. If you complain to them, it's a long process to get a new book.

reviews.review_heading: About my college BAHRA UNIVERSITY.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good, the classrooms are well designed and there are proper seating arrangements for the children. They have provided proper benches and tables for students to study. The facilities at the hostel are also good; they have well-maintained rooms in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied. Please do a good research before choosing a college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. In the classrooms, some seats are broken, and the Wi-Fi speed is poor. In the labs, computers often hang, and there are frequent issues, such as slow internet or malfunctioning systems. For the sports department, there is only one ground where events are held. Mess food is average—sometimes good, sometimes bad. Medical facilities are available, including a university ambulance. Hostel rooms are average, with 3-4 students sharing a room.

reviews.review_heading: NextGen faculty is the best, and the other faculty of the college is also helpfu
reviews.review_text: The course is designed to help students, and the hostel is fine, helping students manage their time efficiently. Food is prepared daily, and everything is great. Every faculty member, including non-teaching staff who help in the hostel, mess, and wardens for safety, is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Very good private university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities in our labs, making it easy to complete our work. Regarding hostels, we have Wi-Fi and attached bathrooms in every room. The quality of food in the mess is good, and we also have medical facilities available.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bahra University

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Symbiosis Skills and Professional University ranks #1 under the category 'Skill University'.

Symbiosis Skill and Professional Studies admissions 2026 are open. Interested students can visit the official website to apply for the respective course.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: -1 by NIRF under c categories -2 by Outlook Ranking

college_info.intro:
Symbiosis Skills and Professional University provides wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels through its schools. Symbiosis Skill University also offers certificate and diploma courses. At the UG level, the Symbiosis Skills and Professional University offers BTech, BSc, and various other courses to students. Whereas, at the PG level, SSPU offers MTech, MSc, and various other courses to students.
At the UG level, SSPU offers the BTech programme in five branches: Automobile Engineering, Computer Science & IT, Construction Engineering & Management, Mechatronics Engineering, and Smart & Sustainable Engineering.
Please find below the latest information about Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune popular programmes offered by Symbiosis Skills and Professional University along with other courses:

reviews_list.review_title: SSPU- The step to enter the practical world.

review_content.Placements: A total of 75 students were placed in our course and we were divided into 2 sections. 70% of the students had gotten college placements through the placement cell. The faculty and placement department had help on how to crack the job/internship selection process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides us a huge library consisting of numerous varieties of books and novels to help us increase our knowledge. We are also provided with high-speed Wi-Fi to help us with our students work. We have our college hostel, which is optional. It has sports facilities, mess facilities and various other facilities given.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Digital Media and Marketing - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Symbiosis! The right choice.

review_content.Placements: There are 94 students in our course. The course is about how digital marketing is indeed and is important in today's world. Placements and internship programs are good. The average salary package offered ranges from 6-9 LPA, and the highest salary package offered in our department is 14 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is peaceful and filled with nature and amenities like a library, an inbuilt Nescafe Outlet, and hill zones for students. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for better learning. There are seminar halls on each floor for guest lectures. The hostel is average and not worth the money paid.

faqs.answer: Yes, the university provides lateral entry or direct admission to the second year of BTech course. A pass in Class 12 with any three of the followed subjects: Physics/ Mathematics/ Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject / Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with at least 50% aggregate in specified subjects (40% aggregate for reserved category) in the subjects taken together is required to apply for the BTech course. Aspirants who have passed Diploma with a minimum duration of three years with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) subject to vacancies in the first year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted can also apply.It must be noted that the mentioned minimum aggregate is as per unofficial sources. fees_overview.description: Candidates can enroll for any of the Symbiosis Skills and Professional University courses by paying the course fee. The fee for the available courses ranges from INR 2,000 - 13,39,000. The Symbiosis Skills and Professional University fee is made up of a number of different elements, including the tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. There are two types of Symbiosis Skills and Professional University fee components: refundable and non-refundable. To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the Symbiosis Skills and Professional University admission process must pay the course fee.

Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. overview_faqs.question: Is Symbiosis Skills and Professional University good for BArch?
overview_faqs.answer: BArch is one of the top course of SSPU. BArch has been mapped as per the job roles in demand in the industry. During the course, tenure students shall go through skill enhancement comprising internship and integrated seminars & workshops on selected topics working on real-time problems with the application of scientific methods. After completing the course, students also get opportunities in MNCs through the SSPU placement drive.

review_summary.college_name: Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for students seeking practical knowledge and for a little privileged ones too.

content.Placements: Outstanding placements, with the majority of students getting placed across the country. About 90 percent of the students who are seriously studying get internships. Tata Motors is one of the companies that gives placement to students.
content.Infrastructure: An 8/10 infrastructure with inbuilt hostels inside the college, having all the necessary labs and large playing areas, including three basketball courts, volleyball courts, a football ground, a stage, a seminar hall, and a different room for students fond of the automobile industry.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Students in our course are 180. We have the highest package of 57 LPA, and the lowest is 6 LPA. All the students get internships from the college in companies such as CDAC, Oppidian India, Jubilant Engitech. Top roles offered in this course are cybersecurity analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is top-notch. We get Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms, and labs for each course. The hostel is well-maintained, and the food in the canteen and mess is also good. We have one health center in the college for emergencies. The college also has basketball, football, and volleyball grounds.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Media and Marketing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: SSPU- The step to enter the practical world.

content.Placements: A total of 75 students were placed in our course and we were divided into 2 sections. 70% of the students had gotten college placements through the placement cell. The faculty and placement department had help on how to crack the job/internship selection process.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides us a huge library consisting of numerous varieties of books and novels to help us increase our knowledge. We are also provided with high-speed Wi-Fi to help us with our students work. We have our college hostel, which is optional. It has sports facilities, mess facilities and various other facilities given.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Media and Marketing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Symbiosis! The right choice.

content.Placements: There are 94 students in our course. The course is about how digital marketing is indeed and is important in today's world. Placements and internship programs are good. The average salary package offered ranges from 6-9 LPA, and the highest salary package offered in our department is 14 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is peaceful and filled with nature and amenities like a library, an inbuilt Nescafe Outlet, and hill zones for students. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for better learning. There are seminar halls on each floor for guest lectures. The hostel is average and not worth the money paid.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Fintech - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Genuine review about the college.

content.Placements: The BBA Fintech course is related to fintech, regtech, and suptech. The college has partnerships with companies such as Paytm, Razorpay, TCS, and Mahindra. The program offers job opportunities in roles like data analysis and business analysis, with companies including Wipro and IBM. Almost 100% of students got placed in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, a library, a digital library, and air-conditioned classrooms with proper chairs and tables. The hostel provides cleaning and laundry facilities. It has a gym along with football basketball and badminton courts. It provides good indoor games and many other things.

admission_process.title: Symbiosis Skill and Professional Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SSPU admissions 2025 are expected to begin. Symbiosis Skills and Professional University offers BTech, MTech, BArch and other courses at the UG and PG level.Symbiosis Skills and Professional Universityalso offers a certificate course in Wellness and Cosmetology. Read on to learn more about SSPU course admissions 2025.

The university offers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Symbiosis Skills and Professional University course admission 2025highlights:
Particulars
SSPU Admission 2024 Highlights
Mode of study
Full-Time, Certificate
Programmes offered
6 courses excluding specialisations
How to apply?
https://sspu.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Symbiosis Skills and Professional University offers courses in the fields ofEngineering, Science, IT & Software etc. SSPU also offers BTech and MSc Lateral Entry courses. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The table carries course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for SSPU course admissions 2025:
Class 12 with 50% aggregate and Physics and Maths as a subject
Class 12 in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate
BSc in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
BTech with 50% aggregate
Check below for more details aboutSymbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune courses

Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune admission process includes registration, entrance exam score, counselling and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune:
STEP 1: Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Fill out the application form and upload the necessary documents. Candidates need to pay an application fee to complete the application procedure. The application fee ranges betweenINR 500 to INR 1,500as per respective courses.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Pune shortlists candidates based on entrance exam score, PI. Shortlisted candidates receive provisional admission letters on registered Emain-ID.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the university. Candidates need to pay theSSPU Pune course feeto confirm their seat at the university.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Symbiosis Skills and Professional University?
faqs.answer: The placement details for the Class of 2024 is yet to be release on the official website. However, as per the students’ reviews on Shiksha page, Symbiosis Skills and Professional University recorded 90% placements for the recent batch of BTech, BArch and MTech courses. The highest and average package offered during the recent Symbiosis Skills and Professional University placements stood at INR 13 LPA and INR 7 LPA, respectively. The key highlights Symbiosis Skills and Professional University placements are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics Placement percentage 90% Highest package INR 13 LPA Average package INR 7 LPA Note : The data mentioned above has been taken from students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.

faqs.question: Does Symbiosis Skills and Professional University offer a full placement guarantee? What is the latest placement record?
faqs.answer: As per the latest students’ reviews on the Shiksha page, Symbiosis Skills and Professional University recorded 90% placements recently for courses like BTech, BArch and MTech, etc. Let’s take a look at the table below for the recent Symbiosis Skills and Professional University placements: Particulars Placement Statistics Placement percentage 90% the highest package INR 13 LPA Average package INR 7 LPA Note : The data mentioned above has been taken from students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.

faqs.question: Is Symbiosis skills and Professional University good in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: The placement details for 2023 batch are yet to be released on its official website. However, few students has shared their reviews on the Shiskha platform. According to the recent reviews, 90% of the recent batch was successfully placed in the reputed companies. The the highest and average package offered during the recent Symbiosis Skills and Professional University placements stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters who participated during the recent Symbiosis Skills and Professional University placements included Aditya Birla, Skoda, Parker, Tata Motors, Bosch, Forbes Marchall, JSW, Audit, Mahindra, Fedex, Sandvik, etc.

faqs.question: How are B.Arch placements at SSPU Pune?
faqs.answer: Symbiosis Skills and Professional University (SSPU) in Pune has a good placement record for Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) students. According to, several students have received internships and placements in top firms under top architects and designers. The B.Arch programme at SSPU has been mapped to the job roles in demand in the industry, and students go through skill enhancement comprising internships and integrated seminars. The programme focuses on sustainable architecture, watershed management, waste management, renewable energy technologies, building simulation, acoustics, thermal comfort, project management, and traditional and modern building technologies. Students get a lot of opportunities to showcase their creativity and ingenuity while designing. The college itself places students into internships of 2 months and 4 months in the final year, which provide exposure and are beneficial in the long run.

Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. nirf.description:
Symbiosis Skills and Professional University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Skill University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Symbiosis Skills and Professional University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Skill University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Symbiosis Skills and Professional University's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Skill University' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Symbiosis Skills and Professional University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for students seeking practical knowledge and for a little privileged ones too.
reviews.review_text: An 8/10 infrastructure with inbuilt hostels inside the college, having all the necessary labs and large playing areas, including three basketball courts, volleyball courts, a football ground, a stage, a seminar hall, and a different room for students fond of the automobile industry.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is top-notch. We get Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms, and labs for each course. The hostel is well-maintained, and the food in the canteen and mess is also good. We have one health center in the college for emergencies. The college also has basketball, football, and volleyball grounds.

reviews.review_heading: SSPU- The step to enter the practical world.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us a huge library consisting of numerous varieties of books and novels to help us increase our knowledge. We are also provided with high-speed Wi-Fi to help us with our students work. We have our college hostel, which is optional. It has sports facilities, mess facilities and various other facilities given.

reviews.review_heading: Symbiosis! The right choice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is peaceful and filled with nature and amenities like a library, an inbuilt Nescafe Outlet, and hill zones for students. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for better learning. There are seminar halls on each floor for guest lectures. The hostel is average and not worth the money paid.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review about the college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, a library, a digital library, and air-conditioned classrooms with proper chairs and tables. The hostel provides cleaning and laundry facilities. It has a gym along with football basketball and badminton courts. It provides good indoor games and many other things.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of Symbiosis Skills and Professional University.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, a library, and a digital library. Classrooms are also air-conditioned with proper chairs and tables. Hostel provides cleaning and laundry facilities. Gym is available. Facilities like football courts, basketball courts, badminton courts, and other indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus, top-notch fests and cultural activities; faculty management needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is among the best and top-notch in all of Maharashtra, and I can guarantee that. The design is based on an Indo-European style with a good theme. However, the quality of the canteen and mess hostel food is below average and not hygienic. The Nescafé in the cafeteria is quite good compared to the food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to actually study and socialize.
reviews.review_text: Building cleanliness, and everything is just nice. You'll like the place. The hostel is nice and there is new building so the rooms also looks pretty good. The food in hostel is ok—not good, not bad, eatable. Also, there are multiple options available for courses you can choose from.

reviews.review_heading: The vice of an architecture student in Pune.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure include Wi-Fi, labs, computer labs, studios, skill center, auditorium, amphitheater, garden, canteen, stationery, sprint shop, snacks shop. Hostel: includes stay (2 students per room) along with washrooms, housekeeping, mess (3 meals a day + high tea).

reviews.review_heading: The campus is really pretty, I absolutely love the campus, and the canteen food is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good; the library is quiet, clean and a good place to study; even the books there are good and referable. There are drinking water coolers on every floor. The Wi-Fi is not quite reliable; it is very slow. The classrooms and washrooms are clean and are cleaned at least three times a week. Hostel facilities are good enough to live neatly, but facilities are quite limited as compared to the feel of the hostel. Most students prefer other luxury hostels or rented rooms nearby the c...

reviews.review_heading: Nice college but needs to improve management .
reviews.review_text: The college infra is good; the hostel is also decent. Food at times is bad but mostly fine. There is a turf on campus that is nice, but there is not a ground. The lab and the library are very and are air-conditioned. Faculty is also very well-behaved, and Wi-Fi is also there.

reviews.review_heading: The College Infrastructure is too good. There are lot of events taking place every month.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The Wi-Fi is a bit slow. The classrooms are good, and the library is the most visited place where people hang out. The canteen is also a very good part of this college because the food there is good. There are fewer sports and games sections in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best to gain in-depth knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were great in this college. Hostel facilities were average. The canteen was not good. The food served in the mess was average.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with placement cell, faculty members, and infrastructure of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent. It looked like we were studying in some other countries. Laboratrioies were better. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The benches were very good in our classrooms. Digital classrooms were well-maintained. There was a huge library, and around 7,000 books were available. Digital books were also available. There was a health center for emergency purposes. The canteen was available. There was a cafeteria on our campus. Sports were conducted and also provided turf. Baske...

reviews.review_heading: Best Architecture University with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college’s Wi-Fi connection is very poor and for the students who need to study or refer some books there is a library available in the campus. I don't stay in the hostel so I don't know much about it but the students who stay in Pune have bus facilities available.

college_info.college_name: Symbiosis Skills and Professional University

data.description: The faculty at Symbiosis Skills and Professional University is a pool of talented and experienced members. The university consists of the Director, professors, assistant professors and associate professors. The university consists of many departments and for each department, there is adequate faculty to provide quality education to students. Dr Gauri Shiurkar is the Director of the Architecture Department. She has done PhD in Architecture and holds experience of 28 years. reviews_list.review_title: Best infrastructure in Tamilnadu with great faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in this college as medical colleges don't offer placements and assured job offers, but there is a bond period of 1 year in which they are paying 12 lacs per annum for every student, but the posting will be in whichever ESI hospital is present all over India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Esic kk Nagar Chennai has one of the best infrastructures in Tamil Nadu, with well-equipped labs and classrooms on par with many deemed universities. Hostel rooms are okayish, and the food here is also good, not a problem. We have 3 outdoor games—badminton, cricket, volleyball—and 2 indoor games—carron, chess—and we also have a gym for hostel students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a decent infrastructure, great hospital OPD and great faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students per batch, and it's a 5-year course, including a one-year internship. During the internship, we will be offered with a stipend around Rs. 20,000 per month. But there is a bond that you have to work for 3 years after the course, and you can break the bond by paying a specific amount.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college building is under construction, so there is some inconvenience. However, it should be constructed soon, and labs and all other equipment needed for learning must be provided. The hospital OPD is great and always full, so it's good learning. But there is no canteen.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A review of ESIC Medical College.

content.Placements: Almost everyone gets placed as we have a compulsory 1-year service. We receive an average of 12 LPA, with comfortable benefits anywhere in India upon completion of our internship. We will be offered a job as a junior resident in a department of choice anywhere in India.
content.Infrastructure: It is a fully AC college with plenty of space. There are very good laboratories for physiology, biochemistry, pathology, forensic medicine, and microbiology. The dissection hall is well-equipped with plenty of specimens. The hostel is clean and has all the required amenities, including a TV room and an AC room.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure in Tamilnadu with great faculty members.

content.Placements: There is no placement in this college as medical colleges don't offer placements and assured job offers, but there is a bond period of 1 year in which they are paying 12 lacs per annum for every student, but the posting will be in whichever ESI hospital is present all over India.
content.Infrastructure: Esic kk Nagar Chennai has one of the best infrastructures in Tamil Nadu, with well-equipped labs and classrooms on par with many deemed universities. Hostel rooms are okayish, and the food here is also good, not a problem. We have 3 outdoor games—badminton, cricket, volleyball—and 2 indoor games—carron, chess—and we also have a gym for hostel students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a decent infrastructure, great hospital OPD and great faculty members.

content.Placements: There are 100 students per batch, and it's a 5-year course, including a one-year internship. During the internship, we will be offered with a stipend around Rs. 20,000 per month. But there is a bond that you have to work for 3 years after the course, and you can break the bond by paying a specific amount.
content.Infrastructure: Our college building is under construction, so there is some inconvenience. However, it should be constructed soon, and labs and all other equipment needed for learning must be provided. The hospital OPD is great and always full, so it's good learning. But there is no canteen.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good teaching facilities with upcoming infrastructural facilities.

content.Placements: The college provides internships after the completion of four and a half years of studies. The stipend we get during this period is Rs. 18,000. After that, they want us to sign a bond that states that we should work for them for 3 years at any place in India depending on the administration's decision. I'm not sure about the salary for those who work under the bond, since the first batch is only doing their CRRI. It has been only around for 5 and a half years since the college is established. We can also break the bond and be free to pursue our own choices. We can either work in a different organisation or try for higher studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is best and the faculty is also good.

content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent of students got placed from my college. 4.5 LPA is the highest and 1.5 LPA is the lowest average package in my college. Bharat Forget, Tata Motors, Bajaj Auto, hohn deere, Land Core, and Capgemini are recruiting companies. 60 to 70 percent of students got internships from my course in college, such as Software developer, trainee engineer, and junior programmer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: All infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: Companies come for SGM placements, such as Bajaj, TCS, Wipro, and Mahindra. So many students are placed in these companies and work happily, and the salary packages are average or moderate. The lowest package of placements is 1.5 lacs, and the highest packages are approximately 4.5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: In college, Wi-Fi is available everywhere for all students, and classrooms are cleaned every day with machines.
content.Faculty: The faculty is good for me and my studies. They help me with my studies by providing all study notes, important questions, and other resources. Teachers are very helpful, with qualifications and knowledge. They teach practical things in workshops and labs for real-life-based learning. The semesters are not easy but not hard. They are moderate. Teachers help with exam studies.

individual_reviews.title: Short review of WCE Sangli.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B Tech degree in Artificial Intelligence and Machine learning from Walchand College. My college has nearly 80 to 85 percent of students placed in top companies from the CSE branch. From 2023, the college intake is increased for the CSE & IT branch and two new branches, AIML & Robotics Automation. Last year, the highest package is near 1.5 crores. Top Tech companies visited the campus, like Rubrics etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

admission_overview.description: Shivaji University admissions are offered on both merit and entrance basis. Students seeking admissions have to meet the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get admission. The university offers 126 undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral courses through various departments. These are Science, Arts, Technology, Management, and Commerce fields. The Shivaji University accepts the scores of national, state, and university-level entrance exams for technical courses, such as BTech, MCA, and MBA. For non-professional courses, including BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., Shivaji University admission is based on its in-house entrance test. The university also offers distance education courses approved by UGC. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Shivaji University.

admission_process.title: Shivaji University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Shivaji University admissions are held online on its official site. Students can apply after checking the eligibility. The process include application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps below to complete theShivaji University admission process:
Application Process 2026

Shivaji University admission starts with the release of the application form. Candidates can complete the application form online. The form has to be turned in with documents and application fees amount before the last date.
Selection Process 2026

Candidates are shortlisted depending on the shorlisting criteria. For professional courses, like MBA, BTech, B.Ed, MCA, etc., the university accepts national-level entrance exams, like JEE Main, GATE, UGC NET, GPAT, MH CET, etc. For non-technical courses, like BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., the university conducts its own entrance test.
Admission Confirmation

Shivaji University releases the merit list based on the cutoff scores in the accepted exams for finalising candidates. Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theShivaji University admission feesto complete the process.

TheShivaji University fee structureincludes different components. Some of these include tuition fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more. Students have to pay the amount through accepted payment gateway. The fees changes based on course and specialisation. Students can check the table below to know about theShivaji University feesfor popular programmes:
*This information is as per the official website and is subject to change.

Admission to MSc is based on an entrance exam conducted by the Shivaji University. MSc is offered under specialisations such asFood Science & Technology,Microbiology,Computer Science,Statistics,Biotechnology,Organic Chemistry,etc. Read on to know more about Shivaji University's MSc course.

faqs.question: How can I get BSc admission to Shivaji University Kolhapur 2025?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Shivaji University Kolhapur, candidates must qualify the eligibility criteria and appear for the University's entrance exam. The table below lists all kind of BSc programme offered at Shivaji University along with the eligibility criteria:ProgrammeEligibilityNano Science TechnologyCandidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.BSc - MSc integrated Nano Science Technology (5 years)Candidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.

faqs.question: How is Shivaji College and can I get admission into it with 95%?
faqs.answer: Shivaji University, located in Kolhapur, was established in1962. The university is accredited withGrade Aby theNAAC. The university affiliates276 collegesthat are spread over three districts of Maharashtra, namely, Kolhapur, Sangli, and Satara. Shivaji Uiversity has better infrstruture than most of DU's colleges. As for the placements, the university offers a decent placements package for its professonal cousres. In 2023, a total of1291 students enrolledand25 studentswereplacedduring Shivaji University placements 2023.Yes, you can get into Shivaji College with 95% in class 12th. The admission to UG courses is done on the basis of marks scored in class 12th. For example, for the BTech programme, the eligibility is 45-50 % in class 12 in the relevant stream. Therefore, with 95% in class 12th, you are eligible for admission to Shivaji College. The admission process for Shivaji College is completely online. For undergraduate courses, admission is based on the marks scored in class 12t. The

faqs.question: What is the fees for Shivaji University admission?
faqs.answer: Shivaji fees is different depending on the programme and specialisation. Students can pay the fees through accepted payment gateway. The payment has to be done timely. The course fees is as below:CoursesTuition FeesBTechINR 51,400 - INR 5.5 lakhBDesINR 1.3 Lacs - INR 1.7 lakhMScINR 2,000 - INR 92,500BScINR 5,800 - INR 47,400MCAINR 42,000 - INR 2.2 lakhMBAINR 50,700 - INR 2.4 lakhNote: This is taken from official sources and can change.

faqs.question: What is the criteria to take admission in Shivaji University for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology?
faqs.answer:
Basic eligibility to secure admission for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology in Shivaji University is that candidate should have a minimum pass mark of 45% in class 12. Candidate must have passed 10+2 in Science stream.
Final year appearing candidates can also apply on provisional basis.
Those Candidates who belongs to other state will have to score minimum 55% marks in 10+2.
Final Selection
Candidates are selected based on Shivaji University entrance exam score and marks obtained in 10+2.
Selection parameters and weightage : 
Entrance Exam Score- 50%
10+2 exam score - 50%
Regards.

placement_data.title: Shivaji University Kolhapur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to NIRF report 2025, a total of 190 students were placed and 12 students were selected for higher studies out of total 239 students during Shivaji University UG 4-year placements 2024 . The median package received by UG 4-year students in 2024 was 3.3 LPA .

The median package recorded during Shivaji University placement 2024 for PG 2-year course was 2.4 LPA . In addition, 672 students were placed and 135 students were selected for higher studies out of 1193 graduating students in 2024.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Shivaji University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #45 under State Public University category. Shivaji University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Shivaji University rankings is covered in the following article:

nirf.description:
Shivaji University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Shivaji University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Shivaji University climbed 6 ranks to #45 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Shivaji University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Shivaji University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 180 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 67 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is best and the faculty is also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: In college, Wi-Fi is available everywhere for all students, and classrooms are cleaned every day with machines.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shri Shahaji Chhatrapati MahavidyalayaReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Affordable fees, supportive staff, but average campus life.
reviews.review_text: I think facilities in my college were good. Clean water was available. Classroom and seperate library were available. There was no Wi-Fi. Quality of college canteen was good, and cheap food was available. Sports like kabbadi, kho-kho, and cricket were available. Medical facilities were very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in my living area, and the faculty is also very good.
reviews.review_text: The schedule is moderate, with around 5 to 15 lectures per week. The facilities are very good. Teaching was also very good, and the facilities include Wi-Fi in the departments. The average quality of the facilities in our hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food is good, available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also good in our college, and sports and games are well supported; there are separate periods for games and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Short review of WCE Sangli.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

reviews.review_heading: Not much recommended due to poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Average with quite natural diversity and good weather conditions as it is located outside Kolhapur city. You can enjoy Kolhapur city and its attractions more often. The college has good food culture and great festivals. Historically, the site is located near the city, which is an overall good city.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Huge green campus, helpful seniors, no ragging, clubs, competition, and respectful students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in library, classrooms, hostels, study room, and on campus too. Labs are conducted in their respective departments. College has very big campus with separate departments and an academic complex for classes and theory lectures. In hostel, we have 4 sharing rooms and 2 shared rooms for NRI. There are playground, jogging track, a mess, and gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and if you want this college for law, this college is very best for law.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is very good, and there are so many things and Wi-Fi all over hostel and college. We don't have lab; we have a moot court hall for the practice of hearing and judgment. All facilities in the hostel and mess are very good and food is like 5 star. Overall, all is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college for mechanical engineering in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The college mess and hostels are very good. Food in the college mess is good and hygienic. The college environment is also good. The campus is silent. College provides various facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and a well-structured library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a big and very clean campus. There are lots of trees present in the college campus thats why the college environment is very good and green. The college provides all facilities such as Wi-Fi, bus, canteen, etc. The college has a big ground for sports activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KIT College of Engineering, KolhapurReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is really a good college for engineering and MBA. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my department, there are fully ventilated classrooms. In all classrooms, there are digital screens from BenQ systems. All classrooms have different Wi-Fi connections. There are fully equipped 6 computer labs with computer systems. There are three different canteens that are well-facilitated. In my hostel, the rooms are clean and clear. A separate study room is available. There is a ground where you can play cricket, volleyball, football, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vasantidevi Patil Institute of Pharmacy, KodoliReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college of pharmacy in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a very good and large campus, and the college's buildings are also good. The college provides all facilities to the students, like Wi-Fi, drinking water, a good library, and classrooms that are also good. The college mess is good, and they will provide good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Government Medical College, MirajReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good institution, good teaching faculty, cultural event, has good facilities and a green campus.
reviews.review_text: Most of our college infrastructure is old, continuing from 1987 (established year), but renovations are going on in many departments. The hospital has many facilities that are required. About hostels, the actual condition is very bad, 4 people in a room, and buildings are very old, leakage and bathroom blockage occur on multiple floors. These need renovation. We have a central library that's new and a very study-focused place. Mess food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by D Y Patil College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: D Y Patil College is very good for those who want placement.
reviews.review_text: Every department has a special building, and there is a garden with some space for students. There are too many labs for every department, and our library is in a different building. Most students live in the hostel, which has a building and a mess. There is no ground for our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is so nice, you come here on a visit and see all over campus and the whole college.
reviews.review_text: Our department has decent classrooms, labs, campus Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean everyday with lots of workers. Mess food is average but hygienic, medical aid is available, and teachers help in my studies, and they provide all notes, etc.

college_info.college_name: St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy:

faqs.answer: A:    St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy provides programmes including B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which courses does St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy offer?

review_content.Placements: Almost 40-60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Abbot, etc. Around 60% of students got internships in our college. In this course, the main role is to provide healthy medicines.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, laboratory, and library are well structured. Wi-Fi is available for all students. The food served in the canteen is delicious. The canteen and mess are hygienic.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-experienced and qualified. Teachers are helpful to all students and they always solve students' doubts. Our college provides different course curriculum and it makes students achieve their goals. Semester exams are tough, and the passing percentage is 40%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The placement is good practicals are also taken very hygienic

review_content.Placements: The placement offered is valuable. There are 100 students in our course. The highest package is 8 Lacs per annum and the lowest package is 3 Lacs per annum. 75% of students got internship from B pharmacy course mainly in company like Cipla, DR Ortho, MacLeod. After B pharmacy you will work in company ad a medical representative, R and D department, coding department.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a very good college. Some say the college has a good infrastructure and campus life, but the placement offers were mainly in sales and marketing. Placements in the college are good. Probably, 20-30 students were placed through on-campus interviews. Salaries offered range from Rs. 9,000 to about 30,000. Pharmaceutical companies visit the campus for QC, QA and other purposes.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the placement quality.

review_content.Placements: Very bad placement in this college. Not even a student comes to this college. There is no placement committee in this college; it was my bad luck that I got into this college. The highest package is a 4 LPA. Which is roughly 20 thousand a month. Not worth taking.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very bad infrastructure of this college. Only the main building is a show off just to gain the attention of parents and students. The pharmacy department building is worse; it is too hot and there is no proper supply of electricity, which is bad. Too bad. Even fans work. Not worth taking admission.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best infrastructure and facilities, the teaching staff is best, and management system is good.

content.Placements: Many students get jobs in this college. Approximately 50 percent of students are placed in good companies. Students enjoy their jobs. They have an interview room where interviews take place. Students get jobs of up to 6 lacs per year. Students also get jobs in the college for teaching.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available, and many laboratories are available. There are two canteens available. There is also a Xerox shop available in the college. The college is situated in a spectacular view. The view during the rainy season is amazing. The classrooms are also nice.
