individual_reviews.title: Includes under India's top 200 colleges.

content.Placements: Certain companies, like Appolo, come for campus placement and select the best students. And the majority of the students need to find jobs by themselves. A student needs at least a 78 to 80 percentile on the CET exam for online admission. The percentile demand may be increased due to an increase in online admissions.
content.Infrastructure: The worst infrastructure has to be improved. Teachers are really good at teaching and managing. But the problem is that there is a shortage of chemicals, so students need to postpone their practices. The view of the college is really nice, especially in the rainy season. Overall, college is good and improving every year.

admission_process.title: St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacy admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.St. Wilfred's Institute of Pharmacyoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Pharma, D.Pharma and M.Pharma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 12,000 - 3,27,180. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: MKCG: A beautiful experience that prepares you for a bright future.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the top colleges for MBBS in Odisha. There is nearly 100% placement after the completion of the courses there are many permanent and contractual government posts available. Some students prepare for PG courses, while others find roles in private medical facilities as healthcare providers. Average packages range from 5 LPA to 10 LPA. There is a compulsory one-year internship for all students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are top-notch, with nice hostels with a beautiful and clean campus. The mess food is good and healthy. There are playgrounds for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. Additionally, there are refreshment corners for coffee and snacks on campus. Hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members, infrastructure, and placements.

content.Placements: Around 250 students from our batch got placed. The starting salary offered is Rs.30,000 per month and the highest salary offered is 1.5 LPM. Top recruiters are AIIMS, SCB, M.Ch., etc. Every student gets internships in our course. Few students pursue PG, MD, or MS.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostels is very good and hygienic. There are proper medical facilities and sports. Students can play chess, volleyball, football, and table tennis. The hostel provides Wi-Fi connection to students.

content.Infrastructure: Hostel is spacious, and electricity and water are available 24*7. Hygiene is properly maintained in the hostel. reviews.review_heading: MKCG: A beautiful experience that prepares you for a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are top-notch, with nice hostels with a beautiful and clean campus. The mess food is good and healthy. There are playgrounds for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. Additionally, there are refreshment corners for coffee and snacks on campus. Hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, infrastructure, and placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostels is very good and hygienic. There are proper medical facilities and sports. Students can play chess, volleyball, football, and table tennis. The hostel provides Wi-Fi connection to students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for medical studies.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is spacious, and electricity and water are available 24*7. Hygiene is properly maintained in the hostel. Food is healthy and nutritious, breakfast, lunch, and dinner are available. As it is a medical college, medical facilities are properly maintained. Sports and games are open to all students.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college to students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were available on campus. The food quality was good. Annual athletic games were held on campus. There was a beach nearby our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very helpful for being a good doctor in future.
reviews.review_text: Campus is very good with many facilities. Hostel is well settled and clean with many facilities such as 24 hours water and electricity. There is a beautiful study room. It serves well-cooked and delicious food. There are 24 hours medical services.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a place to strive, serve and care.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 lecture theaters with a capacity of 300 students. All are centrally air-conditioned, fitted with jammers, to check the negative usage of internet, and Wi-Fi. There is a 6-story laboratory building, centrally air-conditioners, Wi-Fi, ELISA facility, multi utility centrifuge systems, backed for culture sensitivity testing, and pathological facilities to evaluate biopsy, and smears. Our laboratory complex houses, all non-clinical and para-clinical facilities. Rest every other clinical d...

reviews.review_heading: I am right now dissatisfied due to faculty issues.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has accommodation with a mess and a canteen within it. The rooms are average, not bad though. Food is awesome and the electricity bills are paid once a year included in our hostel fee. Sports and games are played here not frequently but definitely.

reviews.review_heading: It may not be the college of your dreams but makes your dreams become reality.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the classrooms are fully equipped for digital learning with centralised air-conditioner and Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are fully air-conditioned with the proper availability of the required apparatus. There is a central library which is a 5-storeyed building with Wi-Fi and centralised air-conditioned with the availability of almost all medical literature books relevant to the courses offered.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government medical college in Southern Odisha with excellent alumni and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, classrooms, and hostels are very good with all basic amenities like canteen, gym, free Wi-Fi, indoor and outdoor games like volleyball, badminton, table tennis, cricket, football, etc. Food quality is good, very healthy, and nutritious with an average Indian diet.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure facilities of our college.
reviews.review_text: We have college library facilities along with a hostel library, Wi-Fi connection, and smart classes by e-learning process. Our college has a good quality of infrastructure and food in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and sports like football, volleyball, cricket, badminton, table tennis, etc. are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good, and fine college. Its doctors are also good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is fine, and Wi-Fi and the library are provided by the college. The hostel's food is fine, no water problem, and its food quality is good. Its surrounding is very clean. The campus is clean. All the games instruments give to play with each other in the playground by our superintendents.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very highly recommended institute in the state.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Classes are well-equipped with air conditioners and digital boards for better teaching. Labs have all the necessary practical equipment. Libraries are well-equipped with all the needed materials manuals books magazines.

reviews.review_heading: It is the healing center of South Odisha and then of budding doctors.
reviews.review_text: It has a huge campus, Wi-Fi, a modern library, and every super specialisation branch. You will have a good hostel facility with minimum cost. There is the availability of single rooms. The food served in a mess is average, and you can have some special south Odisha items. You can also enjoy the local foods, and there are restaurants.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus for doctor aspirants.
reviews.review_text: It has a huge academic block with Wi-Fi enabled. Our classes and practicals occur in that block and respective departments. It is a hospital campus, so the place is crowded always. We have a canteen for the hostel that provides delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Our college owns around 160 acres of huge land in Berhampur city. The campus has separate academic blocks, departmental blocks, auditoriums and meeting halls. There is a huge central library with around 8,000 books, more than 50 journals and newspapers. Lecture theatres and the library are air-conditioned with free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are smart with projectors, big LED screens and speakerphones for professors. Our college has 4 boys MBBS hostels and 3 ladies hostels, and there is a separate hostel...

college_info.college_name: Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy ranks #86 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

placements.overview: Established in 1992, Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The institute offers courses like B.Pharma, M.Pharma, Ph.D., D.Pharma and Pharm.D. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 14 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good and clean. A well maintained campus with friendly lecturers and professors.

review_content.Placements: Many top companies visit regularly for placements. Many companies like Himalaya, Cipla, Leoford, and all of them visit our campus. There are even some placement cells that want to teach how to handle the interview placements. Top roles offered are pharmacist, dispensing clinical pharmacy medical script writers, drug inspector, quality analyst in QC and QA department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi access, spacious classrooms, good atmosphere, and food is very tasty for Indians which may vary individual to individual. There is Nagaratnamma stadium which is a very big stadium on our campus for cricket. Even basketball court, volleyball court, and many other indoor games are available with equipped gym and swimming pool.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: All over the college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Placements of Acharya are very good. Almost more than 10,000 companies visit our campus to recruit students. Our top recruiters are Cipla, Himalaya, Biocon, and Lupin. Our placement percentage is 95%. The highest package goes to 50 LPA. Most of the students got placed in our college with the average package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Everything is available as per your needs on our college campus. Lab and classes are very good. They provide Wi-Fi connection. Lab contains so many instruments. Hostel has so many facilities like carrom, chess, badminton court, swimming pool, etc. Food quality of the hostel is very good and healthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good for B. Pharmacy with better placements.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students get placements every year with an attractive salary package of 7 LPA to 8 LPA. Well-reputed companies from the pharmaceutical field come to offer placements with good salary packages. Mostly quality assurance and regulatory affairs are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-designed and well-equipped labs with sufficient chemicals to perform practicals. Hostel facilities are better and are available separately for boys and girls. Food served in the hostel mess is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I'm highly satisfied with the facilities provided.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of the students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is 30,000 per month, and 15,000 per month is the lowest salary. Mylan, Medchem, etc., are the recruiting companies. Almost 80% of students got internships in various companies. Drug inspector and pharmaceutical marketing are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very well maintained. Classrooms are big. A large variety of books are available in the library. It has a huge stadium along with good sports facilities. Labs are neat and clean. LCD screens are available in the classrooms for digital classes. The hostel is neat and clean and well-furnished. Food is very good. Medical facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am a bit satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Many companies like Medchem and Mylan visit here to hire students, and last time I saw a Dubai-based company visited to recruit students. Our seniors are working in many other companies. They also got an internship from college and heading towards their success.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good here except for food quality in the hostel. I am not staying in the hostel since the past one year. So I don't know whether they improved or not, but they need to change the contract for food to provide a good quality of food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to be legend in your branch and get a secure placement, I suggest Acharya is best.

review_content.Placements: According to the alumni, if you score well, you can get good placements here. I heard from my seniors that, overall 80% students got good placements from here and many good companies visit Acharya. Especially for pharmacy, you can get a good job by joining here.
review_content.Infrastructure: For infrastructure and architecture, this is the second best college in Bangalore. If you don't come here, you won't get any idea about the campus. Acharya is laid across 120 acres of the campus. You can find different blocks for different departments. And the most important thing is the playground.

paragraphs: Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy considers scores in KCET, Karnataka 2nd PUC, and CBSE 12th for admission to specific courses.Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacyoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,07,000 - 1,71,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 3,76,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good and clean.  A well maintained campus with friendly lecturers and professors.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi access, spacious classrooms, good atmosphere, and food is very tasty for Indians which may vary individual to individual. There is Nagaratnamma stadium which is a very big stadium on our campus for cricket. Even basketball court, volleyball court, and many other indoor games are available with equipped gym and swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: All over the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Everything is available as per your needs on our college campus. Lab and classes are very good. They provide Wi-Fi connection. Lab contains so many instruments. Hostel has so many facilities like carrom, chess, badminton court, swimming pool, etc. Food quality of the hostel is very good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for B. Pharmacy with better placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-designed and well-equipped labs with sufficient chemicals to perform practicals. Hostel facilities are better and are available separately for boys and girls. Food served in the hostel mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I'm highly satisfied with the facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very well maintained. Classrooms are big. A large variety of books are available in the library. It has a huge stadium along with good sports facilities. Labs are neat and clean. LCD screens are available in the classrooms for digital classes. The hostel is neat and clean and well-furnished. Food is very good. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am a bit satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good here except for food quality in the hostel. I am not staying in the hostel since the past one year. So I don't know whether they improved or not, but they need to change the contract for food to provide a good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to be legend in your branch and get a secure placement, I suggest Acharya is best.
reviews.review_text: For infrastructure and architecture, this is the second best college in Bangalore. If you don't come here, you won't get any idea about the campus. Acharya is laid across 120 acres of the campus. You can find different blocks for different departments. And the most important thing is the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Pharmacy in Acharya is good. The best faculty, and a friendly environment is present.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is something that every student of this college is proud of. The campus is vast and is spread around 120 acres. The buildings are clean, well-maintained and provided with all facilities. The campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Labs are equipped with expensive equipment. Classrooms are provided with projectors. The library is very big and is open until 8 PM.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best private institutions in Bangalore with the special recognition from industries.
reviews.review_text: It's one of the largest Wi-Fi enabled campus in Bangalore with a total area of 650 acres. The laboratory in the college is well-equipped with all the required instruments and even have few industrial equipment for conducting various experiments. Cleanliness is well maintained. The college is having 2 libraries, one in the college and one central library. College library is open till 7 pm and central library is open till 10 pm. Further, for the safety of the students, free transportation facility...

reviews.review_heading: Very beautiful infrastructure, highly qualified faculties, and a good industrial exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is perfectly designed to encourage the interest of students towards both studies and extracurricular activities. The institute is having the largest Wi-Fi enabled campus of 650 acres. The college has the good library facilities with all the books related to the syllabus and also current affairs and other related knowledge. It also has a digital library facility to access the books and information at fingertips. The library is also equipped with 15 computers with...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but strict. The college has some rules and regulations, which is to be followed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Acharya College is excellent. The college provides all the apparatus, equipment, and pharmaceutical machines, which are required for the practical experiment. The digital class is provided will the well-maintained classroom. The other facilities like library, canteen, and hostel are also provided on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a very good infrastructure, and quality of teaching is good enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The environment is very good, as it is on the outskirts of the busy city. The college premises is peaceful. The interior design is very good and beautiful. The classroom is very spacious and wonderful. There is no problem with anything.

reviews.review_heading: Life at acharya institute.
reviews.review_text:
Our college is best at infrastructure and was also awarded as one of the best infrastructure in Bangalore 
Wi-Fi facility is great but lab facility for pharmacy is not good library is great with huge collection of books
Hostel facility is not at all good but there is PGs near by which is great and convenient for traveling
Sports is great as they take to state levels competitions.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of good placements provided in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in both college and hostel. The mess facility is also available, and quality food is available. The library is also good, and classrooms are completely air-conditioned. The library is very silent, and all books of pharmacy are available. I am completely satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: Acharya B M Reddy College of Pharmacy is the best college in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. Classrooms are also huge. In the library, all types of books are available. Medical facilities are good, and doctors are also available in the college. Sports instrument are available to play games. There is a huge stadium. Labs are neat and clean with all chemicals for the experiment. In classrooms, LCD is available for students to teach in a modern style.

college_info.college_name: Datta Meghe Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Placements

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Datta Meghe Medical College offers UG and PG courses in streams like Medicine and Health Sciences. The college offers MBBS programme at the UG level. At the PG level, the university offers M.Sc., MD and MS programmes. Datta Meghe Medical College fee ranges from INR 1,20,000 to 1,05,75,000 for a course. The courses offered are in Full Time mode.

review_content.Placements: In the MBBS course, placements aren't structured like in engineering; it's more about internships and residency. Around 80-90% of students secure internships, primarily in attached or government hospitals. Top recruiters include Datta Meghe Medical College & Hospital and various private clinics. Internship roles are typically as junior doctors or interns. There isn't a clear package system like with other degrees, but some students do secure residency offers abroad or in reputed Indian hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well-developed, featuring modern labs, advanced equipment, and a library with access to medical journals. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with smart boards. Hostel facilities are good, offering Wi-Fi, clean rooms, medical support, and a healthy mess menu. Sports facilities like a basketball court, gym, and a common recreation room are available. The campus is green and spacious.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A great campus life, good placements, and well-developed infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Mainly 85% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered can vary from 1-1.5 lacs per month. The lowest package can be Rs. 60,000-80,000 per month. Our college has many top recruiting companies like Lenskart, pharmaceutical companies, and many hospitals all around the world. They offer many placements. Many students from my course got placed in hospitals like Dr Patil Hospital Mumbai, AIIMS Nagpur, Government Medical College Nagpur, and so on. There are many top roles offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very great. All the machine equipment and laboratories are very well-managed and hygienic. The hostel has many facilities like airconditioners, a study area, a dining area, a garden and many more. The lunch of mess and canteen taste so good just like our home. All medical facilities are available. There are more activities like cricket football, volleyball and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: It was the best college in Nagpur for medical students. It provided the best futuristic result to build our future. Almost 50% of students got placed in our batch with the highest salary packages. One of the top medical hospitals offered and play the best role as a good doctor in life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided the best infrastructure and facilities. Our college provided facilities like a hostel, mess facility, a canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was excellent. The course curriculum was relevant and made students industry-ready. Semester exams were not difficult.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Datta Meghe Medical College are M.Sc., MBBS. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Datta Meghe Medical College has a rating of 3.4 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 3, 3 and 3 as per reviews by students.
faqs.question: Q: Is Datta Meghe Medical College worth considering?

faqs.answer: The Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research does offer a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, but it is not clear if they offer a specialisation in Medical Engineering. The eligibility criteria for B.Tech programs at Datta Meghe College of Engineering, Airoli, Navi Mumbai, typically require candidates to have passed 10+2 with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry as core subjects, with a minimum of 50% marks in the exam. It is recommended to contact the admission office of the institute for detailed information about the eligibility criteria and availability of the course.

description: Datta Meghe Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Datta Meghe Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 450886 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Datta Meghe Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 450886 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Datta Meghe Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Datta Meghe Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 69974 to 136165. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Datta Meghe Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, followed by MD in Paediatrics and MD in Emergency and Critical Care. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 69974, 96819 and 105708, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In 2023, Datta Meghe Medical College fell 50 ranks to #651 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Top Global Universities' category as compared to the QS World University Rankings of preceding years. In 2024, Datta Meghe Medical College fell 300 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. Candidate of reserved category passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra Board of Higher Secondary Education any recognised institute/board with 40% are eligible to apply. review_summary.college_name: B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in (MLT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.

content.Placements: In our course, around 70-80 percent of students are placed or receive internship opportunities. They are mostly selected based on their practical knowledge in this field. Our course is vocational, i.e., more practical-oriented than theory. Our college has tie-ups with reputed diagnostic centres and hospitals in Mumbai and Thane regions, like Metropolis Healthcare, SRL Diagnostics, Fortis Hospital, and some local pathology labs. Students who go for PG are eligible for their own collection centre license and can start their own business. Roles of this course are Medical Lab Technician and Phlebotomist.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Chemistry, Microbiology, Botany) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.

content.Placements: No placements as such, the batch went for the Master's. A great opportunity for research rather than jobs. M.Sc. students are getting placed rather than B.Sc students. 3 students got an internship in BARC. They were under different experiments and projects in the BARC for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. But some improvements can be made. Maths lab is in goob condition. Library is also good. Canteen is always full, and small in size but okay. Hostels are not available. There is a shortage of classes sometimes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in CBZ (Chemistry, Botany, Zoology) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: B. K. Birla is such a good college.

content.Placements: More than 50 students get placed in this course. As per the placement data available, 465 out of 1925 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.16 LPA in 2024, and 245 out of 772 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.10 LPA in 2024. There is no change in the number of placements and median package compared to the data from 2023.
content.Infrastructure: B. K. Birla College in Kalyan offers a range of infrastructure facilities for courses but does not provide on-campus hostel accommodation. Students who need hostel facilities seek private accommodation near the campus. They provide fast Wi-Fi, and labs are very clean.

outlook.description:
B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #28, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Arts' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #32, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'Commerce' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #39, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab

reviews.review_heading: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.
reviews.review_text: In B.K. Birla College, they provide well-equipped laboratories with all the necessary instruments for biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology in clean and sterile conditions. We have a library with a good collection of books, approximately 10 lakh, as well as computer access for academic activities. We have sports facilities, including a badminton court, a large ground, an indoor area for indoor games, and a gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.
reviews.review_text: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best for simple graduation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. But some improvements can be made. Maths lab is in goob condition. Library is also good. Canteen is always full, and small in size but okay. Hostels are not available. There is a shortage of classes sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty members, strict about security, best event, fest, and library.
reviews.review_text: I am student of B.Sc. mathematics so in my department, sources like books from library, computer lab, headphones, and Wi-Fi connection are available in huge quantity in mathematics department. Fees are affordable but good part is that there is scholarship so you will get your fee back.

reviews.review_heading: B. K. Birla is such a good college.
reviews.review_text: B. K. Birla College in Kalyan offers a range of infrastructure facilities for courses but does not provide on-campus hostel accommodation. Students who need hostel facilities seek private accommodation near the campus. They provide fast Wi-Fi, and labs are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: If you are searching for a fantastic college, then you have come to the right place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It is known as Birla College, where you can do junior college courses and other technical courses for graduation. There is also a sports ground where you can go and play any game you want.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, helpful faculty, decent placements, and a campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department is well-equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has air-conditioned modern classrooms with smart boards and projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. The canteen provides nutritious food. Medical and sports management and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The greatest college for students to upgrade their skills.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay but neat and clean. Washrooms are also clean, but the canteens are crowded all the time. They provide the best facilities to hang out with friends and learn new skills,  like the gym, gaming space, and sports ground. Teachers and staff are so friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, the placement is average, but the campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: AC classrooms with big benches and a clean environment, big windows for proper ventilation, and a gym with proper equipment. There is a tennis court, indoor and outdoor laboratories of Botany, Zoology, Chemistry, and a library. Laptop lab, seminar halls for masterclasses and workshops.

reviews.review_heading: The Best batch of 2024 was given to us.
reviews.review_text: See, the college doesn’t have any hostel, but the process of building one is ongoing. The classrooms of the college are very good. Even this year, the rooms were made better. They provide us with projectors, Wi-Fi, and the campus is very good. The library has a separate building.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, campus, food, and good professors.
reviews.review_text:
We have classrooms, well developed labs, Wi-Fi, pc, library, reading room, etc. Quality of food is 10/10
Gaming room is good, We also have gcr for girls 
Library has section for girls and boys
Washrooms has privacy for girls and for emergency everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, supportive professors, average infrastructure, great security.
reviews.review_text: We do have a Gymkhana, the library is good, a huge ground, canteen, Chemistry and Physics labs, medical unit, and a big infrastructure for that matter with the best security—100/10 for security in our college. It's big, has an NCC unit, and many more such groups such as Rotaract clubs. It helps a lot in self-development.

reviews.review_heading: We had a really good infrastructure, nice college life, very helpful teachers, and coordinators.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided were very good. The college has a good ambiance to study. The canteen has fresh food. There is an opportunity for good sports persons, and you get good opportunities. There is a nice big library and separate rooms for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but average college life with a lot of fests every now and then.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall college is good. Plenty of space to roam and greenery. Availability of gym (although rundown) and a fair ground. Labs are well maintained and the buildings and washrooms are cleaned from time to time. Washrooms for disabled are available on each floor but there is no ramp available for them.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and good faculty, but limited placement opportunities in IT.
reviews.review_text: We have separate IT labs for the IT department with fast and wide Ethernet connections. It does not have hostel facilities, but the food quality of the mess and canteen is very good as they take proper measures for social hygiene. They also have medical facilities for emergency situations with proper medical staff. They also have proper equipment for sports and games as they provide sports events and competitions to encourage student participation.

faqs.question: Where are MLSU alumni working?

faqs.answer: A:    The average salary package of MLSU MBA is INR 5.20 lakh according to students’ reviews on shiksha.com. Top companies, like Tata Motors, Reliance, TCC, etc., visited MLSU campus for placements. Top roles like HR, manager and branch manager of the company are offered to the students.Overall the highest package offered was INR 45 lakh for in 2022 at MLSU. Further, the average package and the lowest package stood at INR 23.10 Lacs and INR 1.20 lakh, respectively.
faqs.question: How is the placement of MBA at MLSU?

faqs.answer: A:    During 2022 placements, the University has recorded the highest-ever package of INR 45 LPA. Earlier, the highest package stood at INR 7 LPA during 2021 placements. Over the past three years, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the highest package. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Admission can be done by applying for courses at the institute. The MLSU offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and MBA/PGDM. There is a wide range of specialisations offered for these courses. Candidates must complete the eligibility criteria before applying for MLSU courses. The fees vary anywhere between INR 5,940 - 2,95,760 depending upon the course chosen. Candidates can have a look at the table below to get an understanding of the tuition fees, eligibility criteria, and qualifying exams necessary for each course:

faqs.answer: A:    MLSU eligibility criteria differs course to course. For BTech and BArch admission at MLSU, candidates must have passed Class 12 in PCM with at least 45% aggregate. MLSU offers a wide range of courses at UG and PG level and most of the courses requires minimum 45%-50% aggregate in their required qualification examination (Class 12 or graduation). Admission to MLSU courses is given on the basis of merit list followed by counselling.
faqs.question: What is the percentage required for MLSU?

faqs.answer: A:    The Mohanlal Sukhadia University fees is different for each programme. Students have to pay the amount to get a seat at the university. The total fee includes tuition fees, admission fees, caution deposit, and more. Check the table to know the fees for popular programmes:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3 lakhMBAINR 6,700LLBINR 5,900 - INR 50,000BScINR 5,900 - INR 69,000MAINR 6,700BAINR 5,900Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.
faqs.question: What is the fees for Mohanlal Sukhadia University?

faqs.answer: A:    The MLSU hostel fee consists of various components including entry fee, room rent, electricity bill and maintenance charges. Hostel fee varies based on the type of room at the university. Students with hostel facilities are need to vacant the room with in the three days of last examination of that year of their course. Below is the hostel fee detail of MLSU Udaipur:-Single Seated Double Seated Yearly SystemINR 11,700 - INR 16,700INR 10,200 - INR 14,200Semester SystemINR 13,450 - INR 19,350INR 11,650 - INR 16,350Note: Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the hostel fees of MLSU Udaipur?

faqs.answer: A:    Mohanlal Sukhadia University has over 60 students as its intake capacity for the BSc programme. This is a three-year course for which, to get admitted, candidates have to secure at least 45% in their Class 12 examination. MLSU offers various specialisations under BSc, such as Science, Mathematics, Computer Science, and other related fields. The university also offers a four-year integrated course in BSc-B.Ed. programme that allows students to obtain a BSc and a Bachelor of Education simultaneously.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are limited and it is around 30 to 40 percent. The highest package ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting organisations are NGOs, counseling centers, hospitals, and academic institutions. Roles offered are mostly counselor, research assistant, teaching assistant, and clinical psychology trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Com from MLSU, Udaipur, and will graduate with the 2025 batch. Around 20-30% of students in our course got placed, with packages ranging from 2 LPA to 8 LPA, and an average of about 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, ICICI Bank, HDFC Life, and some local startups. Around 30-50% of students got internships, mostly in CA firms, banks, and finance startups. Common roles offered are audit assistant, financial analyst, accounts executive, and business development executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

review_summary.college_name: MLSU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.

content.Placements: There are some placements at MLSU, but not many. While many students find employment on their own or take government exams, about 25% of students are placed through campus drives. While some people receive good packages, the average is in the lower-to-mid range. The majority of positions offered are in basic corporate roles, banking sales, etc. The platform is provided by the university, but it's not a placement-driven campus, what matters most is your own initiative, connections, and abilities. Instead of depending on the college to provide opportunities for you, it's more important to create your own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.

content.Placements: Not many of my batchmates are left out of placements. It is pretty fine and satisfied with the placements done here. Many students get placements here. As far as I can remember, the students are also very much satisfied with their respective placement offers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They are very qualified, knowledgeable, and experienced. The course curriculum is also very relevant. It makes the students industry-ready. Exams are not that difficult. Teachers are helpful and friendly with the students. Teachers are again very supportive and helpful.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.

content.Placements: Placements are limited and it is around 30 to 40 percent. The highest package ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting organisations are NGOs, counseling centers, hospitals, and academic institutions. Roles offered are mostly counselor, research assistant, teaching assistant, and clinical psychology trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Com from MLSU, Udaipur, and will graduate with the 2025 batch. Around 20-30% of students in our course got placed, with packages ranging from 2 LPA to 8 LPA, and an average of about 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, ICICI Bank, HDFC Life, and some local startups. Around 30-50% of students got internships, mostly in CA firms, banks, and finance startups. Common roles offered are audit assistant, financial analyst, accounts executive, and business development executive.
content.Infrastructure: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 40% placement rate for this course. The package started from 2 to 10 LPA. MPC Cloud Consulting Pvt. Ltd. was the top recruiting company. Approximately 30% of students got internships. The top role provided by the companies was accounting manager.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was top-notch. All libraries, classrooms, and labs were excellent. That helped in my studies. The quality of facilities the college provided was also good. The food quality, the sports fields, and the medical facilities were all nice.

admission_process.title: MLSU Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Mohanlal Sukhadia University (MLSU) offers seats to eligible students after completion of all the admission stages. Before applying for MLSU admission, students must check the eligibility of the programme first. See below the guide forMLSU admission process:
MLSU Application Process 2026
Interested students can apply online through the MLSU admission portal (mlsuadmissions.sumsraj.com). Students may also submit the applications offline with documents + application fees.
MLSU Selection Process 2026

Admission is offered based on the merit list in the last qualifying exam. Students have to submit the marksheet of the last qualifying exam based on which a merit list is drawn. For courses, such as MBA, the university may consider national-level entrance tests. Students also have to go through counselling process before completing the admission process.
Seat Confirmation

Selected candidates are required to appear for the counselling round for the final confirmation of the admission seat. After the selection, students can apply for the hostel through the 'Hostel Apply' section (if required) on the admission portal and pay the admission fee through net banking/debit/credit card.

TheMLSU fee structureinclude different components. These are admission fees, tuition fee and hostel fee and more. The amount has to be paid through the accepted payment gateway. Some of the components are one-time payments, while the remaining are to be paid annually or semester-wise. Students can check the table below to know about theMLSU Udaipur feesfor some of the popular programmes:

placement_report.college_name: MLSU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: MLSU Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: As per MLSU overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA , INR 4 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.2 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, 606 students were placed during 2022 placements and 100 students opted for higher education . The highest package offered was INR 45 LPA . Further, the average package and lowest package stood at INR 23.10 LPA and INR 1.20 LPA , respectively. The median package offered during MLSU placements 2022 was INR 7 LPA . PI Industries Limited recruited the highest number of students.

Top companies, like Tata Motors, Reliance, TCC, etc., visited MLSU campus for placements. Top roles like HR, manager and branch manager of the company are offered to the students. Overall the highest package offered was INR 45 lakh for in 2022 at MLSU. Further, the average package and the lowest package stood at INR 23.10 Lacs and INR 1.20 lakh, respectively.

faqs.answer: The MLSU hostel fee consists of various components including entry fee , room rent , electricity bill and maintenance charges. highlights.description: MLSU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #64 in the Pharmacy category. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in MLSU rankings.

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, MLSU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. MLSU's rankings in 'Pharmacy' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, MLSU fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'State Public University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, MLSU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
MLSU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 400 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 134 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: MLSU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Mohanlal Sukhadia University UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjects

reviews.review_heading: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious, green, and gives a peaceful vibe to the university. The classrooms are clean but not very modern; some buildings show signs of age. The library is genuinely useful, calm, and perfect for study sessions. Wi-Fi works in some places but is inconsistent everywhere. Computer labs work but aren't high-tech. The space given for sports and outdoor activities is there, and basic but affordable food is available at the canteen. Overall, the infrastructure isn't flashy or modern, bu...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was top-notch. All libraries, classrooms, and labs were excellent. That helped in my studies. The quality of facilities the college provided was also good. The food quality, the sports fields, and the medical facilities were all nice.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, but you have to dedicate time to your studies.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs are different for MCA and BCA students. Two libraries are here, and there is a mess and medical facilities, but they are not for BCA students. They are for the university, Mohanlal Sukhadia University. So apply if you want to come.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the university, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel experience is average. There is no Wi-Fi or library. 80% of students live in private PG because the university does not have a place to make students stay. The university infrastructure has been developing but not developed since I was admitted.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, check it ones.
reviews.review_text: My college facilities and infrastructure are above average. It has 1 lab, 1 classroom, and 1 library. There is no Wi-Fi, its not bad infrastructure but same time not good. There is no hostel, no canteen, and no medical facilities. But every month sports and games events are organized by students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable course and shows that the BCA program is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: I pursued a BCA in Computer Science from the 024-2026 batch. The infrastructure of the IT department is well-developed. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, including labs and library.

reviews.review_heading: Mohanlal Sukhadia University is overall the best college for every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and an excellent environment for students. The food quality is good, and the library offers the best environment on campus. The medical facilities are average, but we have solid sports and games programs.

reviews.review_heading: College with average fee, good quality, availability of labs, library, canteen, and best study.
reviews.review_text: Mohanlal Sukhadia University in Udaipur had a well-established infrastructure with facilities like spacious classrooms, specialized labs, and a large library. Basic amenities like electricity, water, furniture, and TV rooms were available. Girls' hostel had CCTV surveillance. The hostel mess provided hygienic food. Hostels were located within the university campus. The hostel environment was fresh with a big garden. MLSU had a health center with doctors and nursing staff for the university commu...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of lack of infrastructure and placement cell.
reviews.review_text: There are two libraries, with free A.I.R. subscription. Buildings are nicely ventilated however, classrooms don't get clean that often. Wi-Fi services are not available. The canteen is almost non-existent. No sports infrastructure and medical facilities are also questionable.

reviews.review_heading: I felt disappointed because of the placement issues.
reviews.review_text: Law department classrooms are functional and well-maintained with a healthy and clean environment. Facilities include two libraries with chairs and tables and one library is air-conditioned and has cool drinking water facilities. Washrooms are clean and well-maintained. It provides a canteen and other parking facilities. Hostel facilities are provided with a library, good food, clean mess, washrooms, and other areas. It has sports facilities like basketball, volleyball, badminton, cricket, etc. ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri Govind Guru Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is not outstanding. It has good infrastructure. Faculty members are quite good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent but not outstanding. Classrooms and labs are functional, but average. The library has a massive collection and it is sufficient for basic needs. Sports facilities are available for every sport. The infrastructure is average but sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Degree Science CollegeReviewed on 2 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is actually very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college was very good. The science labs, library, and gym were available in the college and hostel. The quality of food was very good in the hostel. A canteen was also available on the college campus. Medical facilities, games, and sports were provided by the college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mohanlal Sukhadia University

faqs.question: How are Assam Don Bosco University MBA placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can join without JEE. However, if you don't appear within the JEE Mains then the University offers admission in B.Tech through 3 access options. JEE Main, Don Bosco University GET, or Assam CEE. If you haven't cleared the JEE Main examination or the State Entrance test, you may also practice for the DBU-GET. However, the entrance exam is necessary for admission to B.Tech at Assam Don Bosco University.
faqs.question: Can I join Assam Don Bosco University without JEE Mains for BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    While applying for BTech admission at Assam Don Bosco Universit, applicants are required to submit the relavent documents supporting their eligibility. These required documents should be uploaded during the application process on the university's official website as part of the application form submission. The university has specified a detailed list of such documents. The same has been listed below:Originals of mark sheets for verificationProof of date of birthCaste/Tribe/ Community certificate if applicableStudent health form duly filled
faqs.question: What are the documents required during BTech admission process at ADBU?

faqs.answer: A:    Don Bosco University admissions are based on scores obtained from various entrance exams. The entrance exams accepted for B.Tech are the JEE Main and the DBU-GET. Most other UG programs do not require an entrance exam, but candidates must meet the minimum eligibility requirements for each program. MBA candidates are required to take any of the entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, JMAT, XAT, GMAT and DBU-PGET. M.Tech candidates do not need to take an entrance exam for admission to the M.Tech program, but they must have a minimum 60% marks in the qualifying UG degree with a good academic record.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Assam Don Bosco University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information. The total cost of the Assam Don Bosco University program is Rs 3,60,000. Total tuition is subject to change each year based on a number of variables including specialization chosen and co-payments.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.

review_content.Placements: There are many placement opportunities as well as internship programs in the college. Even this year, a good number of students got placements after their internships, about 30%. The companies usually belong to the banking and marketing sectors, and the salaries offered range from Rs.20,000 to Rs.40,000, which is quite enough for an entry-level job, especially in the northeast regions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.

review_content.Placements: As I am pursuing BBA at Assam Don Bosco University Azara, here the average package for BBA students is around Rs 2 to 3 Lacs per annum and the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Infosystems, The Adecco Group, BSNL, Reliance Communications, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Microsoft, Wipro, SpiceJet, Shriram Value Services.
review_content.Infrastructure: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, just want to inform you that hostel gates are closed after 6 pm. If we talk about food, they provide veg and non-veg options, but the quantity is very less. The water facility is not really good, and toilets are not clean.

faqs.answer: No, Assam Don Bosco University BCom (Hons) admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset eligibility criteria. The university provides admission to only those applicants who submit the application form timely and meet the prescribed eligibility requirements. However, the selection of the applicants is based on an entrance exam, followed by the PI round. To pursue the university's BCom (Hons) course, applicants must have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised board. They must have scored at least 50% aggregate in Class 12 or equivalent examination. Selected candidates are issued admission offer letters by the university.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at Assam Don Bosco University for BCom (Hons)?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to Assam Don Bosco University BPharm and applying for admission through the online mode must check all details filled in and proceed with the payment. They must pay an ADBU BPharm application fee of INR 600. The application fees can be paid online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods. However, the above mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative
faqs.question: Q: What is the application fee for BPharm at ADBU?

faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University offers BPharm at the UG level. faqs.answer: To secure admission at Assam Don Bosco University for BCom (Hons), candidates must start by applying for the programme. They must fill out the detailed application form and submit it along with an application fee of INR 600. After completing the application process, aspirants must wait for an admission offer letter issued by the university to shortlist candidates. The university prepares a list of the students based on the eligibility criteria and seat availability for BCom (Hons) in the university. The selected candidates should be admitted by paying an admission fee.

course_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharm is available at Assam Don Bosco University. It is offered through the ADBU School of Pharmacy and Research. course_faqs.question: Is the semester-wise pattern prevailing for BCom at Assam Don Bosco University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, there is a semester pattern that prevails in the case of BCom at Assam Don Bosco University. This undergraduate programme is subdivided into two semesters each academic year. However, each semester usually lasts around 18 weeks so that learning is systematic. It is an undergraduate programme pursued for four years consisting of eight semesters. The university provides BCom (Hons) as a full-time programme. Below is the first semester BCom (Hons) syllabus.Environmental StudiesFinancial Accoun

course_faqs.answer: Yes, Assam Don Bosco University offers scholarships of up to INR 2.10 lakh to the students enrolled in its BCom (Hons) course. The university offers various tuition fee waiver schemes and scholarship schemes to encourage meritorious students to avail of the excellent academic ambience. overview_faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University offers two Pharmacy courses, BPharma and DPharma. For admission to both courses, candidates are required to fill out separate application forms. After filling out the form, they must pay the below-mentioned application fee to successfully apply:CourseApplication Fees BPharma/DPharmaINR 600Note: The below mentioned fee is taken form the official sources. It is subject to change and, hence, inductive.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA programme at Assam Don Bosco University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information.
