overview_faqs.question: Can I use any online payment application to pay fee at Assam Don Bosco University?
overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University offers online and offline mode of payment. The modes of online payment include credit/debit cards or Netbanking. Candidates can also opt for offline payment need to send a Demand Draft in favour of Assam Don Bosco University.

review_summary.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: Since the Chemistry department encourages students to pursue their careers in research, there are limited placements. Only teaching-related recruiters come to the college and offer an average salary of 4 LPA. This year, recruiters like Avanti Group, Azim Premji Foundation, and some local colleges came.
content.Infrastructure: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: I am in my first year here, so opportunities for me were not quite many. Seniors got opportunities from companies like Amazon, Google, Microsoft, TATA, Wadhwani Foundation, Internshala, etc. There were opportunities often. One can prepare for competitive exams well.
content.Infrastructure: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.

content.Placements: There are many placement opportunities as well as internship programs in the college. Even this year, a good number of students got placements after their internships, about 30%. The companies usually belong to the banking and marketing sectors, and the salaries offered range from Rs.20,000 to Rs.40,000, which is quite enough for an entry-level job, especially in the northeast regions.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.

content.Placements: As I am pursuing BBA at Assam Don Bosco University Azara, here the average package for BBA students is around Rs 2 to 3 Lacs per annum and the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Infosystems, The Adecco Group, BSNL, Reliance Communications, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Microsoft, Wipro, SpiceJet, Shriram Value Services.
content.Infrastructure: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, just want to inform you that hostel gates are closed after 6 pm. If we talk about food, they provide veg and non-veg options, but the quantity is very less. The water facility is not really good, and toilets are not clean.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus

content.Placements: Placement is not taken important in our university. There is placement staff who invites the recruiter for interview so one who are interested go for the interview. Since I didn't go for interview I don't know the highest or lowest package offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

admission_overview.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Admission 2025: Application Process, Selection Criteria, Entrance Exams & Updates

admission_overview.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Assam Don Bosco University admission process 2025 is based on both entrance exam and merit for UG and PG courses. ADBU admissions are opne now, and interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university. ADBU - Assam Don Bosco University, the only university in private sector with NAAC 'A' Grade in Assam, offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma level including BTech, BSc, BCom, MBA, MTech, MSW etc. Admission to BTech and MBA programmes is done on the basis of entrance tests JEE Mains/ Advanced, and MAT/ CAT, respectively.

admission_process.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Assam Don Bosco University is open for admission now. Candidates can apply online and pay the application fee. Once the candidates make a payment for application fee, the Admission Office will schedule an entrance test/ interview for them, and the details will be informed to them personally.
Below is the step-by-step process for Assam Don Bosco University admission:
Step 1: ADBU Application
Candidates must apply online through the official website of Assam Don Bosco University @dbuniversity.ac.in
Step 2: ADBU Selection Process
Entrance Test (DBU) and Personal Interview will be conducted on the same day.
Step 3: ADBU Documents Submission
Candidates must submit the following documents at the time of admission,
Step 4: ADBU Admission Fees Payment

Candidates who are qualified for admission are to pay the admission fees (non-refundable) before 5:00 pm on the day of admission. The balance fees payable are to be paid within 7 days. The payment may be made via PayTM / GooglePay / BHIM or online at the admission portal of the university/ a NEFT to the university account(Axis Bank,Khanapara, Assam Don Bosco University A/C Don Bosco Society).
Please note that no fees will be accepted in cash or cheque.

placement_report.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: Assam Don Bosco University (ADBU) Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Assam Don Bosco University placement team is always working hard to find and create job opportunities for students. They collaborate closely with the students, who are a key part of the team, to make sure the students gain the best exposure to the corporate world. The University is yet to release its placement report for 2025 however, the NIRF Report for 2025 has been released. In all 208 students scured placements during Assam Don Bosco University placements. Out of these 208 students, a total of 42 UG 3-year students scured placements with a highest package of INR 3.41 LPA .When compared with last year, the median package has increased from INR 1.92 LPA to INR 3.41 LPA, presenting an increase of 77.60%. The median packages for UG 4-year and PG 2-year stood at INR 3.68 LPA and INR 2.76 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

hostel_campus.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The University offers separate hostel accommodation for boys and girls. The boy's hostel named as Carreno Hall managed and run exclusively for DBCET students by Don Bosco Society, Azara. The girl's hostel is managed and runs exclusively for DBCET students by Ferrando Developmental Educational Welfare Society. 

These hostels offer a number of facilities for students such as:
Well-furnished rooms with wifi enabled
High-speed Internet and Intranet services
Safe drinking water
Round the clock security
Television in common room
Hygienically prepared vegetarian and non-vegetarian food

library.description: The Library with its modern collection of knowledge resources and innovative information services provides necessary supports for teaching, learning, research activities of the University by creating state-of-the-art facilities to the academic community. The entire Library collections are made available through OPAC. The Library is now partially automated using Koha ILMS for running its housekeeping operation which is an integrated system connected to all the three campuses i.e, Azara, Tapesia & Kharguli campus network, providing online access to catalog & e-resource facility. The Library offers a range of information services to support the learning process set to the highest professional standards.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, ...

reviews.review_heading: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also  good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: I also like the simplicity of the campus and easy access to the library.
reviews.review_text: In one room, 4 people have to stay. The room is small, though the placement of your property (bed, cupboard, table) is arranged in such a way that you don't feel occupied by them. They provide shower-type, basin-type bathrooms. And for the food, they don't have a kitchen in hostels. But they have canteens near every hostel block. So no pre-payment of foods; you will have to buy the food at the moment and eat. But nothing to be worried about the prices. It's affordable. For thalis, they range 50-...

reviews.review_heading: The college environment is very good, nice, and clean.
reviews.review_text: My overall experience in the college is very nice. I love being a part of this college experience. Many kinds of programs are held on our college campus, like DBIM fest, etc. There are plenty of books and journals in the college library, and the classes are fully equipped with smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: College atmosphere is well and good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were amazing, and the cost was also affordable. Even though there were no food facilities in the hostels, we had four canteens inside the campus, which were cheap and the food was also tasty. Hostel wardens were very caring and sincere, and in case of any medical emergency, they were always there. There were different clubs as well, for example, music, dance, art & craft, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Sc.  Zoology at Assam don bosco university.
reviews.review_text: Awesome Don Bosco University provides grade infrastructure for the student of M.Sc.  Zoology as they provides online library services We need clean classrooms which are fully ventilated and air-conditioned. hostel facility is also there, and queer students got five-time food, 24/7 Wi-Fi and electricity services. They also integrated medical insurance.

reviews.review_heading: Assam Don Bosco University Provides Excellent Facilities in the M.A. English Course
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent and attractive, featuring well-maintained classrooms, fully equipped labs and online library facilities. They also provide hostel facilities with five meals a day, prioritizing student safety.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in Assam Don Bosco University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university are average. We get Wi-Fi, whose speed is around 30 Mbps, with around 10 computer labs and specific rooms for the engineering students. There is a library, which is the best infrastructure that is provided, as many kinds of books can be found in it. There are four floors of classrooms and each specific department has its own staff rooms and toilets. The hostel provides a fairly good infrastructure, and I will agree that the environment around it is very ...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are pretty large and so we have 4 members in each room, fully furnished rooms with 4 fans one for each one of us. The study table is attached to the bed plus 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, we have 3 canteens as the college is very large each near hostels, the canteen provides 3-time meals and you have to buy a couple each time you eat, there are different departments selling Indian, Chinese, Tribal food and many more. So the food money is not included i...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were amicable in nature.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent and spacious, with reasonable rent, providing a clean and conducive environment for studying. The food is also good, resembling a home-cooked meal. The average cost for both UG and PG students is 27,000 for 6 months. The hostel is located within the campus, allowing parents to visit their children anytime. External expenses range from Rs. 2000 to Rs. 4000.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were very friendly in nature.
reviews.review_text: Our rooms are quite large, accommodating 4 members in each room. They are fully furnished with 4 fans, one for each occupant. highlights.summary: WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Haldia Institute of Pharmacy, Haldia admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

table.details: - Pharmacy Council of India (PCI) - Directorate of Medical Education (DME), Kolkata
- West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS) - State Medical Faculty of West Bengal (SMFWB)

college_info.intro: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy offers BPharm and DPharm programmes to students. BPharm is an undergraduate programme that deals with the study of Drugs & Medicines, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Medical Chemistry, etc. The BPharm graduates could work as pharmacists in hospitals and clinics. The programme offers various other career opportunities to students. The DPharm programme at HIP is offered for a duration of two years. The DPharm programme covers various areas of study such as Pharmacy Software Practice, Prescription Processing, and Inventory Control, among others. Candidates can check the Haldia Institute of Pharmacy popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Haldia Institute of Pharmacy course admissions are both merit and entrance-based.

For admission to its BPharm programme, the institute accepts the scores of the West Bengal Joint Entrance Exam (WBJEE). To be eligible for the BPharm admissions at the Haldia Institute of Pharmacy, candidates must have completed HSC (Class 12) or its equivalent test from a recognised board with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and any one of the following subjects: Mathematics/ Biology/ Biotechnology. The candidates must have scored at least 45% aggregate marks in the aforementioned subjects and a minimum of 40% marks in English to be eligible for BPharm admissions. Haldia Institute of Pharmacy also provides lateral entry admission to its BPharm programme. The DPharm admissions at the institute are based on the merit of the last qualifying exam, i.e., HSC (10+2) or its equivalent examination.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy courses include BPharm and DPharm. The BPharm and DPharm programmes are recognised by the PCI and the Directorate of Medical Education (DME), Kolkata. The institute has recently introduced new courses such as MPharm in Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Analysis, and Doctor of Pharmacy. Candidates must know their Haldia Institute of Pharmacy eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. Candidates can check the courses and fee details of the institute in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Haldia Institute of Pharmacy offers entrance-based admission to UG, PG and PhD courses. The college offers many courses, such as BPharma, MPharma, PharmaD and DPharma. The college accepts WBJEE, WBJEE JELET, GPAT, NEET entrance scores, followed by counseling round for admisison to BPhrama, BPharma Lateral, MPhrama and PharmD, respecticely. Further, the college offers admission to DPharma is based on last qualifying exam score.
faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to Haldia Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to complete Class 10 and Class 12 with PCMB stream with 45% aggreagte to apply for Haldia Institute of Pharmacy BPharma. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply and appear for WBJEE entrance exam, followed by counselling and required to fill out the application form by visiting the official website of Haldia Institute of Pharmacy.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Pharma at Haldia Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for DPharma is INR 2.5 lakh. Applicants are required to pay some amount of fee after completion of all the selection rounds to lock the final seats. If a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, the college rejects their application. The mentioned fee is as per West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WEBJEE). The provided total tuition fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for D.Pharma at Haldia Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates can apply for the MPharma programme at Haldia Institute of Pharmacy without GPAT. The college also conduct college level entrance exam for admission to MPharma courses. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to score a good aggregate in one entrance exam accepted and conducted by the college including GPAT and university level entrance exam.

It also offers a DPharm programme to students. The admission to these courses is either merit or entrance-based.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Haldia Institute of Pharmacy, Haldia offer to students?

faqs.answer: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates can get direct admission to the DPharm programme offered by the institute on the basis of the merit of the last qualifying exam. While for admission to the BPharm programme offered at the institute candidates must appear for the West Bengal Joint Entrance Exam (WBJEE).
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission in Haldia Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: CHaldia Institute of Pharmacy, Haldia offers merit and entrance-based admission. The college offers admission to BPharma, MPharma and PharmaD is based on an entrance exam followed by counselling round, accepted by the college. Students interested in admission to any of these courses must appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university. Further, the college offers merit based admision to DPharma. Additionally, the applicants must fulfill the eligibility criteria to secure admission. Such as UG students must complete their Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate and PG students must have a UG degree with 50% aggregate.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in Haldia Institute of Pharmacy, Haldia?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for Haldia Institute of Pharmacy is differ from one course to another. To be eligible for a UG, and PhD course, applicants must have completed Class 10 and Class 12 in PCMB with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. For PG courses, applicants must have pass BPharma degree with at least 55% aggregate.Given below Haldia Institute of Pharmacy courses eligibility criteria and selection criteria:BPharma:Eligiblity: Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent with Physics & Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics or Biology with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)Selection Criteria: WBJEE+ CounselingDPharma: Eligiblity: Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent with Mathematics, Biotechnology, Biology, and Physics as compulsory subjectsSelection Criteria: Merit- BasedMPharma:Eligiblity: BPharma with 55% aggregate (50% for reserved category)Selection Criteria: GPAT+ CounselingPharmaD:Eligiblity: Class 10 and Class12 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics or Biology OR D. review_summary.college_name: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Almost everything is good in our college, the faculty and placements are both good.

content.Placements: In our college, about 85% of students are placed. The highest package is Rs. 35,000 per month, and the lowest package is Rs. 19,000 per month. Almost 90% of students get internships from our college. Companies like Mankind, Cipla, etc, visit our college. The role offered are QA, QC, production, MR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition. All facilities are available in our department. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. The labs and classroom are good, and the canteen in our college is also good. Sports and games are so interesting in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for pharmacy studies.

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed from this college. The highest salary offered in our course is Rs. 12000 per month, and the lowest is Rs. 10,000 per month. Recruiters include Apollo. Around 70% of students got internships from our course at Apollo and Sasta Sundar. It is the best college for pharmacy in Haldia. It is the best course.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are available. A library is available for better learning and a good future. Hostels are available. The quality of the food is good. The food is healthy. It also provides medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college had good placements in 2022, and I am satisfied with faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Around 65-70% of students got placed in our college. The top recruiting company is Apollo Pharmacy. After completing the course, students can get jobs in hospitals, industries, and retail stores.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is very good. The hostel rooms are huge with good restrooms. There are no air conditioner facilities in the hostel rooms. A supervisor is always present in the hostel. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. A playground is available near the hostel. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. The library is good. All labs are well-maintained. Our canteen is open 24X7.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, the faculty s are also good .

admission_overview.college_name: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Courses & Fee, Application Process, Eligibility

admission_process.title: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy admission is entirelyentrance-basedfor all the courses. Further, the college offers admission to DPharma based on the last qualifying exam score. Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy offersBPharma, DPhrama, MPharma, and PharmDat the UG, PG, diploma and PhD levels, respectively. Admission to all the courses isopen, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria before applying for admission.Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacyaccepts various exams such asWBJEE, NEET,andGPATfor admission to UG, PG, and PhD courses. It is mandatory to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exam for admission. Additionally, applicants must visit the college website to register for admission. Read the complete article for more detailed information aboutHaldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy admission 2025, course-wise eligibility, selection, course fee, and seat intake:

Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy, Haldia admission process 2025 is completely online. To get admission, applicants must apply via the college's official website for the desired courses. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The selection process and eligibility and selection criteria forHaldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy coursesare given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent with Physics & Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics or Biology with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent  with Mathematics, Biotechnology, Biology, and Physics as compulsory subjects from a recognised board
Merit-Based
BPharma Lateral
Diploma in Pharmacy from any polytechnic or recognised institute with 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)
WBJEE JELET
BPharm degree with 55% aggregate (50% for reserved category)
GPAT, University Level
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics or Biology
D. Pharm. or Diploma in Pharmacy from any recognised institute

Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy admission process contains various steps which have to be followed by the candidates for admission. The admission process begins with filling out the registration form, appearing in the accepted entrance exam and counselling round and final seat confirmation. Applicants searching for admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. Further, for a diploma in pharmacy, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to grab a seat. Go through the given steps to know more about the Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy  admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Candidates searching for admission to various programmes at Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy must fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college. To apply for admission, applicants must check out and follow course-wise eligibility and selection criteria set by the college.
Step 2:  Selection Round

The eligibility and selection criteria set by Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy is to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to BPharma and PharmaD courses. Further, for admission to MPharma courses, applicants must pass BPharma with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. Additionally, applicants must fill out the selection criteria i.e., apply and appear for WBJEE, JELET, GPAT, and NEET for admission to UG, PG and PhD courses, respectively. Further, admission to DPharma is based on the last qualifying exam score. The college releases the merit list based on their scores in entrance exams and counselling.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation

Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment. The selected applicants are required to make Haldia Institute of Pharmacy Pharmacy fee payment within the given deadline to grab the seats

review_content.General: The infrastructure is the only thing of the college that is the best thing here. We are accompanied with wifi facilities in the hostel, the lecture halls of the college are also good, having white boards and projectors with good seats; and the labs are also good for biochemistry and physiology. The mess food is just edible—not very tasty but just edible. Other medical facilities are present in the hospital and an ambulance is also provided. The students are active in sports and games and various matches and tournaments are held like playing football, cricket, volleyball, Kabaddi, etc. They also get prizes on winning, which are brought by the charity done by the game members.

review_summary.college_name: TS Mishra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, but the patient flow is low.

content.Placements: There is no direct placement provided by the medical colleges. We have to qualify for NEET PG for post-graduation courses. We can also apply for positions like medical officer, professor, etc. The packages start from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,50,000 per month after completing MBBS. Top government colleges offer higher pay compared to private hospitals
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hospital, as well as the college is great. It is well-maintained, with a proper supply of water and electricity. Wi-Fi is provided in the hostel, and a mess facility is available. The library is available for borrowing books, and the labs are well-maintained. The lecture halls are in good condition, with proper facilities for instruments and beds.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, but not with the patient flow.

content.Placements: We are a batch of 150 students but at present the new batches are of 200-250 students. There are no particular placements given; students can do jobs as per their choice after the internship in the college they like. The offered medical courses are chief medical officer, postgraduate courses, tutors, surgeons, pediatricians and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the only thing of the college that is the best thing here. We are accompanied with wifi facilities in the hostel, the lecture halls of the college are also good, having white boards and projectors with good seats; and the labs are also good for biochemistry and physiology. The mess food is just edible—not very tasty but just edible. Other medical facilities are present in the hospital and an ambulance is also provided. The students are active in sports and games and various matches and tournaments are held like playing football, cricket, volleyball, Kabaddi, etc. They also get prizes on winning, which are brought by the charity done by the game members.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college but lacks management.

content.Placements: All the students will become doctors, so they would all get placed somewhere. It all depends on our efforts to get placed. In the medical line, you don't need to care about your placements as you will eventually get placed for sure.
content.Infrastructure: One thing I could proudly say about our college is its infrastructure. It doesn't lack infrastructure in any case. All the things required in a medical college, such as dissection room, labs, library, common rooms, study halls, canteen, and mess, are available here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It provides good infrastructure and faculty members, but the management is not good.

content.Placements: All doctors would be going to be placed somewhere somehow. It all depends on students' efforts that lead to their placements. In the medical line, students do not need to care about their placements, they will eventually going to get that.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure did not lack in any case. All the things that were required in medical college such as dissection room, laboratories, library, common rooms, study halls, canteen, mess, were available.
content.Faculty: Eventually medical was all about students' efforts and their determination. Faculty members were mere pawns that leads to students' success. Students thought best faculty members in our all academic years which finally leads to their end course hasslefree but its mostly all about self-determination.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a top-notch private medical institute in Lucknow.

content.Placements: Almost every student gets placed in a medical college due to the dire need of doctors, and some students get placed in our own hospital. The salary offered to the students ranges from Rs. 45,000-60,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 52,500 per month. An internship is mandatory for all students in our own hospital with a stipend of Rs. 6,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: There are 5 lecture theatres, 2 demonstration rooms and respective labs as per MCI for all the departments. Lecture theatres have enough space to accommodate all the students with the amphitheatre styled along with the smartboard, internet facility and air-conditioned facility. There are 2 central libraries with about 10,000 books, medical journals and computers. There is a canteen, which provides a range of food items with adequate hygiene measures. Quality of food served is above average. There is a cricket, football ground, basketball, volleyball and badminton court. There is a common room for indoor games. The hostel is single lodging in a flat, which contains 3 rooms, i.e., one WC, bathroom along with a common hall.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Nice infrastructure, faculty, experienced and listen to students. most of them.

review_content.Placements: If you are coming here, please do not expect placements unless you are a 9+ CGPA person. At the time of registration, the admission cell has huge banners showcasing their placements, where people reached good placement packages in other courses. I am a bit impressed till I looked at the B.Tech banner. The highest they showcased is 4 to 5 LPA packages which if you go to other reputed college were 8 or 10. Now people know that sometimes colleges fake placement. So now, imagine they flexed and probably fake 5LPA jobs. I literally have no hope for college placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.

review_content.Placements: In the civil branch, there are very less enrollments compared to the CS branch, so if we look at percentage-wise, the placement in the civil branch is good and high. The highest package for the civil branch is 5.45 LPA offered by Adani Construction. Top recruiters are Adani and Ultra Tech.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our course are not even of National standards. There are no Wi-Fi. Labs are not well-equipped for present times, library is good but they lack standard books and you cannot go to library during class. In hostel, the food is very oily and spicy which could affect health of students even after many complain to the warden there has been no impact.

review_summary.college_name: Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Once you're here, you'll feel you've come again to a strict school.

content.Placements: There is a very low placement percentage directly from college, and some seniors said that this year, 1 company came here, but majorly, placements are from TCS, Infosys, and companies like that. Placements are okay, not 10 or 8 LPA, but the start is 5 LPA-6 LPA, which is the highest right now. And if you're coming just by looking at placements, then I don't think there is any scope unless you have an 8 or 9 CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. It is a bit of a small college, but from inside it looks decent, and even the classrooms and library are better than most colleges, I feel. If they find you anywhere except your classroom, attending a lecture, then you'll hear so much from them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and better placement.

content.Placements: They provide a place in various fields across off site campus and if a vacancy inside campus. Most placements are in BBA, MBA and B.Pharma. Very little in B.Tech as compared to LPA. As per the last record and data, B.Tech students got a few packages.
content.Infrastructure: I am an dayscholar so as per I have visited and roamed around the infrastructure and the campus is awesome. Huge playground for sports and activities with quite enough space for gardening and parking. High security and full discipline and the main thing is to be punctual sharp at 8:50am at the GATE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Nice infrastructure, faculty, experienced and listen to students. most of them.

content.Placements: If you are coming here, please do not expect placements unless you are a 9+ CGPA person. At the time of registration, the admission cell has huge banners showcasing their placements, where people reached good placement packages in other courses. I am a bit impressed till I looked at the B.Tech banner. The highest they showcased is 4 to 5 LPA packages which if you go to other reputed college were 8 or 10. Now people know that sometimes colleges fake placement. So now, imagine they flexed and probably fake 5LPA jobs. I literally have no hope for college placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: In the civil branch, there are very less enrollments compared to the CS branch, so if we look at percentage-wise, the placement in the civil branch is good and high. The highest package for the civil branch is 5.45 LPA offered by Adani Construction. Top recruiters are Adani and Ultra Tech.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our course are not even of National standards. There are no Wi-Fi. Labs are not well-equipped for present times, library is good but they lack standard books and you cannot go to library during class. In hostel, the food is very oily and spicy which could affect health of students even after many complain to the warden there has been no impact.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering branch from Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management. In our branch, core companies come are very less so we should have our own connection. Chances of students getting internships are also low. In our course, we can become electricians, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi for students. Labs are decent and below average. Classrooms are good but the library is much better but it is also not accessible anytime. There are certain periods in which we can access it. In the hostel, the food quality is as usual and not good. Only volleyball is played in sports.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The hostel has Wi-Fi facility, Prayer Hall, Recreation Hall, Visitors' Hall, Guest room, Hygienic canteen, General Store, Stationary Shop, Cosmetics and Snack Shop, Photocopier stall, PCO with ISD and STD facilities, Exhaust system along with 24 hours electricity and water supply.
The first preference for the hostel accommodation will be given to the students coming from outside Varanasi favoring the newly admitted students in B TECH, MBA & B PHARMA. Those from outside of Varanasi, but studied in Varanasi will be given hostel accommodation at par with outside Varanasi students provided they produce a certificate for their stay in the hostel.

library.description: Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management's library has a collection of 22012 volumes of books with 3452 titles. It has subscribed online journals of IEEE, J-GATE, ASTM, EBSCO, BENTHAM etc and e-books of world e-book library and it has subscribed more than 89 Indian and International Journals and magazines in print. Digital library is equipped with 30 systems to access e-journals and e-books. In addition Multimedia e-Learning center and photocopying are made available for the convenience of the users. NPTEL facility (National Program on Technology Enhanced Learning) to access web and video lectures is available in the library. It also provides National Digital Library of India facility for huge collection of e-Learning resources with a single window search facility.

reviews.review_heading: Once you're here, you'll feel you've come again to a strict school.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice. It is a bit of a small college, but from inside it looks decent, and even the classrooms and library are better than most colleges, I feel. If they find you anywhere except your classroom, attending a lecture, then you'll hear so much from them.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and better placement.
reviews.review_text: I am an dayscholar so as per I have visited and roamed around the infrastructure and the campus is awesome. Huge playground for sports and activities with quite enough space for gardening and parking. High security and full discipline and the main thing is to be punctual sharp at 8:50am at the GATE.

reviews.review_heading: Nice infrastructure, faculty, experienced and listen to students. most of them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better in comparison to most colleges as the classrooms look nice and the library and canteen are nice looking with good facilities. The Wi-Fi sometimes works and sometimes does not. Depends on your luck. The overall college is small but it is good looking and most facilities work properly.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our course are not even of National standards. There are no Wi-Fi. Labs are not well-equipped for present times, library is good but they lack standard books and you cannot go to library during class. In hostel, the food is very oily and spicy which could affect health of students even after many complain to the warden there has been no impact.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students. Labs are decent and below average. Classrooms are good but the library is much better but it is also not accessible anytime. There are certain periods in which we can access it. In the hostel, the food quality is as usual and not good. Only volleyball is played in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure but not the faculty members and teaching system.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent. Not so big not so small but the structural design is very nice. The design of this college can easily attract you to take admission. Classes are also decent not so big. More than 100 classrooms are available here. I am not a hostler but the hostel buildings are big from the outside.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institute is just awesome giving a good vibe. Facilities also are the best suitable for a college which include tables, Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, a library, a chemistry lab, etc. The quality of the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is very excellent. It is the best private college in entire Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities in our college. The hostel food is very expensive. There is an amazing and beautiful canteen in the college. On campus, we will get positive things everywhere, which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and provides good quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All the classes are neat and clean. Every class has 2 cameras, one smart board, and fully air-conditioned in B.Tech department. CS classes are very big. There are many computers available for the comfort zone of the students. Wi-Fi is quite good. Infrastructure of library is best and neat and clean with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in the home state of Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel and classrooms are also fully Wi-Fi enabled. Labs and the library are available. There are both girl's and boys hostels. Mess food is hygienic and tasty. Canteen and medical support are available. Sports and games areas are available on campus for better health and enjoyment of students.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy to share my college infrastructure and management details.
reviews.review_text: When we talk about my college infrastructure, it is very good, and my department is very good. Yes, the college provides free Wi-Fi, classrooms have a full air-conditioning system, smart boards, etc. The lab facilities are not bad. I am not a hostel, so I don't know about that. Thank you.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college was good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom was good. The library infrastructure was the best in my college. There is a Wi-Fi issue in college; the Wi-Fi does not work properly. The quality of the food was not good; it was oily. There are no medical facilities in the college or in the hostel. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Ashokians with really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management has the best library as it consists of all the necessary books and also good content books. Campus is completely surrounded by Wi-Fi. Different branches have different Wi-Fi networks. Infrastructure is also overall good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ashoka Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is quite good, and hygiene is also well-maintained. There is an air conditioner in every classroom, and classrooms are decent. Hostels are quite decent, and rooms are quiet and clean. The food is also good here. Most of the books for my course are available in the central library. Wi-Fi connectivity is quite good, and  internet is fast. Labs in my college contain almost every piece of equipment and computers needed for students. Cafeteria is quite clean, and food is ...

reviews.review_heading: I don't have expectations from Ashoka.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of our college is not that good. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs don't have the capacity and are of low standards. Library doesn't have much variety of books, it has syllabus books from different authors and publishers. There is Wi-Fi available in hostel, but in some rooms, the network is not so good. As with many other hostels, mess food is worst, and more oily food is served. There is a facility of volleyball in the hostel.
Whereas there is Wi-Fi available in hostel ...

Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences has course specializations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, Community Medicine Nursing, Medical Surgical Nursing, Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing, Psychiatric Nursing, Paediatric Nursing.

The institute has specializations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, Community Medicine Nursing, Medical Surgical Nursing, Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing, Psychiatric Nursing, Paediatric Nursing.

review_content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are very good. Each subject has its own lab, and each lab has highly experienced lab attendants. In the hostel, the food is hygienic. The canteen is not available in the hostel, but it is available on the college campus. Medical facilities are available for hostel students. Sports and games are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. Students are very well prepared for the industry. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are conducted very strictly. It is not difficult on a semester exam to score 50 marks out of 100 in each subject.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: Our batch members are like regular batch students, and the course is very tough compared to other courses. At a minimum, 75% to 90% of the students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered is 1.4 lac per month, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 47,000 per month. Almost 80% of the students got internships from the course in our college hospital itself. Roles offered are a technical officer in laboratories, chemical designer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like labs are very good and in progress, but classrooms are not available for us till now. The library is available from a good learning perspective. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel is too bad in condition, and the food quality is very poor. Medical facilities are good, but there are no sports and games in the hostel because there is no ground in college and hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's all in our hands, we can make it beautiful .

content.Placements: I wasn't sure about placement. But we learned a lot from that. We individually search our jobs. Not the worst at all. Some of our batchmates are placed in their own hospitals. Most of them got their jobs. There is no lack of placement. Mainly, in medicine, we want to search for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Library and other facilities are okay. But hostel facilities for medical students are not good at all. Hostel food is very ordinary, and if we can adjust, then we are happy. If you feel not okay, then you have chances of staying in an outside hostel; there are so many PG hostels there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best pharmacy college in Coimbatore, with experienced staff and a good lab facility.

content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are very good. Each subject has its own lab, and each lab has highly experienced lab attendants. In the hostel, the food is hygienic. The canteen is not available in the hostel, but it is available on the college campus. Medical facilities are available for hostel students. Sports and games are available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. Students are very well prepared for the industry. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are conducted very strictly. It is not difficult on a semester exam to score 50 marks out of 100 in each subject.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences.

content.Placements: Our batch members are like regular batch students, and the course is very tough compared to other courses. At a minimum, 75% to 90% of the students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered is 1.4 lac per month, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 47,000 per month. Almost 80% of the students got internships from the course in our college hospital itself. Roles offered are a technical officer in laboratories, chemical designer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like labs are very good and in progress, but classrooms are not available for us till now. The library is available from a good learning perspective. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel is too bad in condition, and the food quality is very poor. Medical facilities are good, but there are no sports and games in the hostel because there is no ground in college and hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences.

content.Placements: The minimum strength of students is above 60%. The charge 2 lacks for donation. Above 60% of students got internships from our course in companies like Conquer pharma and Cancer Laboratories.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course in our college are somehow good. Library has only a few branded books. Classrooms are of good size. Facilities in the hostel are not good mainly the food served in the hostel is not at all worth the money we pay.
content.Faculty: All the professors in our college are always helpful to students. They provide knowledge to us through their teaching skills. This course curriculum is relevant and it also makes students ready for industries. Semesters are not more difficult if we learn them by our heart. The pass percentage is above 50%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students got placed in our college. Our college provides internships in its hospital. Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Apollo, etc., visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities. We have labs and libraries. Our college does not provide Wi-Fi. The hostel provides free Wi-Fi. The food served in our college is average. We have a primary health center. The ground is small.
content.Faculty: All the teachers are very helpful and polite. They are highly qualified. The course is relevant. Exams are very difficult. The pass percentage is 50%.

paragraphs: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciences admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences and Nursing.Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Paramedical Sciencesadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 12th and Tamilnadu 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,50,000 - 10,20,000for UG, PG and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

table.details: Sun Pharma, Macleds, Cipla, Lupin Diagnostics, AMRI Hospitals

college_info.intro:
Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology's popular programmes are BPharma and DPharma. BPharma and DPharma students are placed in top companies such as Sun Pharma, Macleds, Cipla, Lupin Diagnostics, AMRI Hospitals, Fresenius Kabi, and others. The college provides quality education to the students under the guidance of experts. Overall, Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology is one of the best colleges offering education to students.
After completing their education at the Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology, students can become Pharmacists, Drug Inspectors, Medical Underwriters, Food Inspectors, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology and their respective eligibility and Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology admission are based on JEE Main/ WBJEE exam score for the BPharma programme. Aspirants applying for BPharma at ECPT can appear for JEE Main/ WBJEE. Candidates applying for admission should pass Class 12 examination with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics as the subjects with minimum of 45% aggregate (average) in the above subjects (40% for SC/ST/PWD/OBC) and have to qualify in West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) or Joint Entrance Examination, (JEE Main). The admission of the candidates would be as per guidelines of MAKAUT & PCI.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is green and faculty members are helpful.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors pass out with good marks and many students are placed in companies like Alkem, Mankind, Torrent Pharma, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Lupin, etc. This is our first batch and our placement record is impressive. There is a placement cell in our college. Teachers are very active in placements. Around 90% of students are placed at reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Everything is available in the laboratory that a pharma laboratory required. Our college has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for effective study. Several books are available in the library. Many magazines and newspapers in both English and Bengali are available like The Hindu, The Telegraph, etc. The hostel is average but Wi-Fi is available all time. The canteen serves quality food at a decent price. Mess is available. All medical facilities are available. There is a playground on campus, and many students play football after their studies. There is a common room for indoor games like carrom and table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college, and it encouraged me to build my career.

review_content.Placements: It is a growing college, and we are the first batch and will be passed out in 2022. Our college had put various efforts to guide and help us to get placed in renowned companies. Our college has hired a placement officer to train us on various professional skills. Our college has also arranged industrial visits to provide us with industrial exposure. Overall, it is a great thing to start our career.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a free Wi-Fi facility all around the campus, along with well-equipped laboratories, digital classrooms and common rooms for both boys and girls. Our college also has gymnastic for boys and a well-furnished library which contains various magazines, guides, books, references, newspapers and a lot more. There are also hostel facilities for both boys and girls very near to our college building. The canteen in our college is good, and they maintain hygiene in its surroundings with healthy food. There is a huge playground inside the campus, and our college organises inter-college sports week every year in January.

review_summary.college_name: Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All teachers in our college are accommodating and highly qualified. Hence, the college is good.

content.Placements: Our seniors passed out with good GPAs, and many students were placed in companies like Sun Pharma and Torrance Pharma. Our first batch was released in 2022, and the placement record was impressive. The second batch was released in June 2023. There was an active placement cell in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college was excellent and continuously developing. The laboratory was well-equipped with facilities like a pharma chemistry lab and a pharma microbiology lab. The college had Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for practical study. Various pharmacy books were available in the library. The hostel was available on the college campus. The centennial served quality food at a reasonable price. The campus was green, and there was a playground.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college for pharmaceutical studies and developing careers in pharmacy.

content.Placements: Our seniors pass out with good GPAs, and many students are placed in companies like Sun Pharma, Torrance Pharma, etc. Our first batch release was in 2022, and our placement record is impressive. This year's second batch will be released in June 2023. There is an active placement cell present in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent and developing. Everything is available in the laboratory as a pharma chemistry lab, a pharma microbiology lab, etc. Our college has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for practical study. Several types of pharmacy books are available in the library. The hostel is available on the college campuses. The centennial serves quality food at a reasonable price. There is a green campus and a playground on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is green and faculty members are helpful.

content.Placements: Our seniors pass out with good marks and many students are placed in companies like Alkem, Mankind, Torrent Pharma, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Lupin, etc. This is our first batch and our placement record is impressive. There is a placement cell in our college. Teachers are very active in placements. Around 90% of students are placed at reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Everything is available in the laboratory that a pharma laboratory required. Our college has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for effective study. Several books are available in the library. Many magazines and newspapers in both English and Bengali are available like The Hindu, The Telegraph, etc. The hostel is average but Wi-Fi is available all time. The canteen serves quality food at a decent price. Mess is available. All medical facilities are available. There is a playground on campus, and many students play football after their studies. There is a common room for indoor games like carrom and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college, and it encouraged me to build my career.

content.Placements: It is a growing college, and we are the first batch and will be passed out in 2022. Our college had put various efforts to guide and help us to get placed in renowned companies. Our college has hired a placement officer to train us on various professional skills. Our college has also arranged industrial visits to provide us with industrial exposure. Overall, it is a great thing to start our career.
content.Infrastructure: There is a free Wi-Fi facility all around the campus, along with well-equipped laboratories, digital classrooms and common rooms for both boys and girls. Our college also has gymnastic for boys and a well-furnished library which contains various magazines, guides, books, references, newspapers and a lot more. There are also hostel facilities for both boys and girls very near to our college building. The canteen in our college is good, and they maintain hygiene in its surroundings with healthy food. There is a huge playground inside the campus, and our college organises inter-college sports week every year in January.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college with reasonable fees.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed was 70-80%. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 2 LPA. The average package was 3 LPA. The number of students who got internships was very low. The top roles offered in my course were hospital pharmaceutical officer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good in my department. The Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms were well-equipped. The library had a good number of books. The quality of the hostel was good, and the food quality was good. The sports facilities were among the best. Games were organized by my department and other departments as well.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Pharmaceutical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: VELS University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Laundry facility is available to the students on chargeable basis. Mess and Canteen facility is also available for the inmates at reasonable rates.

library.description:
VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has a fully automated central library with a seating capacity of 500 persons and follows Open Access System. The library has a collection of 114305 books, 137717 e-books, and 10032 back volumes. It has the subscription of more than 359 Periodicals (National & International), more than 12381 e-journals, 4106 dissertations, 4849 audio-visual resources.
It also facilitates access to e-journals from IEEE/IEL, ASME, ASCE, EBSCO, ProQuest, BENTHAM Science Pharmacy, Micromedex’s Drugdex System, Inventi Online, Nature Online, Law finder, NPTEL etc.
The library is also an associate member of Madras Library Network (MALIBNET) and Institutional member British Council Library.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really best college in Mohali.

review_content.Placements: 3 to 5 percent of students were placed in various hospitals. The highest package started from Rs 70,000 per month and the average package was about Rs 45,000 per month and Rs 25,000 per month without hostel. Recruiting companies were mainly in the private hospital. We got our internship from the hospital GMC and rest of the private clinics. The roles offered in our course were the X ray technician computed tomography MRI and various others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course was quite good. Classrooms were spacious, equipped with projectors, and had clean seating. Our labs were well-maintained with proper computers, lab assistants, and updated software. Library had a decent collection of books and also provided access to online journals. Hostel facilities were average. Rooms were shared (usually 2 or 3 students), and the basic amenities were provided like a bed, table, chair, and cupboard. Wi-Fi was available but sometimes slow. The mess food was okay, though not great. It was edible but repetitive. Bathrooms were cleaned regularly, but water issues sometimes occurred.

The roles offered in our course were the X ray technician computed tomography MRI and various others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course was quite good. Classrooms were spacious, equipped with projectors, and had clean seating. Our labs were well-maintained with proper computers, lab assistants, and updated software. Library had a decent collection of books and also provided access to online journals. Hostel facilities were average. Rooms were shared (usually 2 or 3 students), and the basic amenities were provided like a bed, table, chair, and cupboard. Wi-Fi was available but sometimes slow. The mess food was okay, though not great. It was edible but repetitive. Bathrooms were cleaned regularly, but water issues sometimes occurred.

admission_process.title: Saraswati Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saraswati Group of Colleges admissionis entrance and entrance-based. It offersUG, PG and after 10courses in numerous specialisations.Saraswati Group of Collegesis affiliated withBaba Farid University of Health Sciences. Some of the courses provided by it include B.Sc. (Post Basic), UG Diploma and M.Sc. courses. Admission is based on scores obtained in national-level entrance exams. BSc Post Basic, UG Diploma, and MSc, etc., are some of the popular courses offered atSaraswati Group of Colleges. The college also conducts the SGC NEST exam for scholarships. Read the following article to learn all about the admission process, courses, and admission criteria of the college.

Saraswati Group of Colleges course admissionis subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Saraswati Group of Colleges offers these courses in streams such as Neuroscience & Mental Health Nursing, Paediatric Nursing, General Nursing & Midwifery, General Medicine and Ayurved, and more. Candidates can either appear for the Common Entrance Test conducted by the institute or provide a valid score obtained in any of the other accepted tests. Students can check out the table below to learn about the general eligibility and selection criteria forSaraswati Group of Colleges courses:

The admission procedure for Saraswati Group of Colleges includes multiple steps, such as application, selection, and seat confirmation. Eligible students can then proceed accordingly with the rest of the steps. Students need to register themselves and go through the selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. Find below the steps to complete the Saraswati Group of Colleges admission process:
Step 1: Appear for the Accepted Entrance Exam

Since admissions are offered on an entrance basis, students must provide a valid score card of the accepted tests. For that, candidates need to appear for the accepted test mentioned above in the table.
Step 2: Apply Online

Students can visit the official website of the institute and start the application procedure by registering themselves and providing the specified information, such as personal details, educational qualifications, contact information, etc.
Step 3: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates on an entrance basis. The final selection is made based on the entrance exam score, followed by an institute-level interview. The interview is a rigorous process conducted to asses candidate's aptitude, leadership skills, etc. Detailed admission criteria can be obtained by visiting the official website of the institute.
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay theSaraswati Group of Colleges feesto secure their spots at the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: To get a seat in Saraswati Group of Colleges, candidates need to meet the course-specific admission criteria. Those who qualify for the programme of choice can then fill out the application form given on the website or connect with the admission desk to apply offline. Applicants are then selected based on the pre-decided admission criteria. For certain courses, such as BAMS, admissions are made on the basis of entrance exam scores or academic merit as per the course requirements. For final selection, students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spots.

faqs.question: Are admissions open for Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Yes,  Saraswati Group of Colleges admissions are open for various courses. Students seeking to join the college need to visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired programme. Interested candidates need to firstly check the admission criteria of the desired programme. The admission process is mainly conducted online.

faqs.question: How can I prepare for BSc admission at Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Students seekingSaraswati Group of Colleges BSc admissionsmust familiarise themselves with the pre-requisites of their course preferences. These details consist of particulars such as fee structure, scholarship details,eligibility criteria, etc. Students can visit the official Saraswati Group of Colleges website and check out the prescribedentrance examsthat are required by the university administrations. Popular entrance-tests for BSc admissions includeSGC NEST, NEET, and others.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Saraswati Group of Colleges goes up to 280. Courses offerred by Saraswati Group of Colleges are approved by eminent Government bodies such as INC, AICTE.

It is the only tuition fees for the programme. The fee structure does not inculude hostel and other fees in the tuition fees.
